sections.homepage: Skip to main content LinkedIn Top Content People Learning Jobs Games Get the app Sign in Join now Python Developer Software Development Find best Python resources, articles and learn new things every day about Machine Learning, Deep Learning and AI See jobs Follow View all 98 employees Report this company About us Not another boring programming meme page, here you can find best Python Components, Resources and Articles. Website https://pybuddy.com External link for Python Developer Industry Software Development Company size 2-10 employees Type Public Company Locations Primary Get directions Employees at Python Developer Joseph Penrod Anamika Nehra meysam samani Madhavv kapadia See all employees Updates Python Developer 10,600 followers 8mo Report this post 📢 New Opportunity: Mathematics Labeling Expert (Remote, India) Mercor is hiring advanced mathematics professionals — PhD holders, doctoral candidates, and top Master’s graduates — to support a major AI research initiative with a leading AI lab. This role involves reviewing and validating complex mathematical data, evaluating solution quality, checking multi-step reasoning, and providing clear written feedback across areas like Real/Complex Analysis, PDEs, Dynamical Systems, and more. 🔍 Key Details: Part-time (20 hrs/week), fully remote Independent, asynchronous work Ideal for experts in advanced mathematics and rigorous analytical reasoning Compensation: $20–$30/hour (contractor role) A strong fit for mathematicians who enjoy precision, problem-solving, and contributing to high-impact AI research. https://bit.ly/3XsnPng Mathematics Labeling Expert - India - Mercor Jobs work.mercor.com 1 Like Comment Share Python Developer 10,600 followers 8mo Edited Report this post 🔔 New Opportunity: Senior PyTorch Operator Engineer (Contract, Remote) If you’re experienced with PyTorch internals and enjoy working close to the metal, Mercor is contracting with engineers to build and extend custom PyTorch operators used in modern AI systems. This role is ideal for someone who knows their way around: • PyTorch’s dispatcher, ATen, autograd • C++17+ extensions and operator-level customization • Profiling, benchmarking, and performance tuning across CPU/GPU • Writing clean, well-documented operator definitions Contract Details: ✔ Remote, asynchronous work ✔ $100–$160/hr (up to $200/hr for extensive experience) ✔ Collaborate with CUDA/kernel specialists ✔ Contribute to primitives powering state-of-the-art AI models ✔ Flexible, outcome-focused environment If you’ve built PyTorch custom ops or contributed to PyTorch/TorchInductor/Triton, this is a great match. Apply here: https://bit.ly/3JVFPTY PyTorch Operator - ML Engineer - Mercor Jobs work.mercor.com 3 1 Comment Like Comment Share Python Developer 10,600 followers 10mo Report this post What do you think about creating the MVP with no code tools? No-Code Solutions 26 followers 10mo 🚀 Want to test your SaaS idea fast? You don’t need to wait months (or hire a dev team). With today’s no-code tools, you can build your MVP in days: ✅ Validate your idea quickly ✅ Show real value to early users ✅ Save $$$ before investing in full development Some game-changing no-code tools to try: 🔹 Bubble – build full web apps without code 🔹 Webflow – design and launch polished websites 🔹 Airtable – your flexible database 🔹 Zapier / Make – automate workflows 🔹 Stripe – handle payments instantly Your first version doesn’t need to be perfect, it just needs to solve a problem. No-code makes that possible. 💡 The faster you launch, the faster you learn. #SaaS #NoCode #MVP #Startups 1 Like Comment Share Python Developer 10,600 followers 10mo Report this post Which No-Code tools you use and why? https://lnkd.in/e2SCZmDV No-Code Solutions 26 followers 10mo 🔥 Developers, hear me out... you should learn no-code. Not because it’s replacing you (it’s not). But because it makes you dangerously efficient. Here’s the deal: ⚡ MVPs in hours, not weeks Test ideas before you burn weeks writing boilerplate. ⚡ Automate the boring stuff Stop wasting time building dashboards and forms from scratch. ⚡ Speak the same language as business folks no-code bridges the gap, you become the go-to problem solver. ⚡ Ship more, faster – and isn’t that the real flex? No-code doesn’t make you “less of a dev.” It makes you the kind of dev who can move between code and no-code like a Swiss Army knife. 👀 The future isn’t code vs no-code. It’s code + no-code. Would you ever call yourself a “full-stack” dev if you didn’t have this skill in your stack? #NoCode #Developers #BuildFaster Like Comment Share Python Developer 10,600 followers 10mo Report this post If you are using No Code tools and you plan to have your agency in future, follow No-Code Solutions for amazing insights: https://lnkd.in/emrppRtY No-Code Solutions 26 followers 10mo How to Find Clients for Your No-Code Agency? (3–5 Is All You Need) Most no-code freelancers are guessing where clients hang out. But every tool leaves a trail. - Webflow → use BuiltWith to find 500k+ companies already live - Airtable → scrape company job boards looking for “Ops Coordinator” or “CRM Manager” - Zapier → search AppSumo or IndieHackers for teams drowning in manual workflows - Notion → LinkedIn filters for “Operations Manager” + “Knowledge Base” The pattern? Don’t convince businesses to adopt a tool. Find the ones already using it, and offer to make it work better. You don’t need 100 clients. You just need 3–5 on retainer to build stability. That’s how a “no-code solutions” shop scales without burnout. Follow No-Code Solutions for more insights. Like Comment Share Python Developer 10,600 followers 10mo Report this post Top 5 Python Interview Questions You Should Know Whether you’re preparing for a tech interview or just brushing up your skills, Python is always in the spotlight. Here are 5 common Python interview questions that often pop up—and what they test: 1️⃣ What are Python’s key differences from other programming languages? 👉 Tests your understanding of Python’s strengths—readability, dynamic typing, extensive libraries, and versatility. 2️⃣ How are lists, tuples, and sets different? 👉 Lists = mutable, ordered. 👉 Tuples = immutable, ordered. 👉 Sets = unordered, unique elements. (Interviewers check if you can choose the right data structure.) 3️⃣ Explain Python’s Global Interpreter Lock (GIL). 👉 A classic! Shows if you understand concurrency, multithreading, and multiprocessing in Python. 4️⃣ What are decorators in Python? 👉 A favorite question that tests if you understand higher-order functions and how Python handles abstraction. 5️⃣ How does memory management work in Python? 👉 Covers garbage collection, reference counting, and how Python optimizes memory behind the scenes. Write your answers in comment section 5 Like Comment Share Python Developer 10,600 followers 10mo Report this post Great article about N8N workflows: https://lnkd.in/ecsrJj3U No-Code Solutions 26 followers 10mo 🚀 Supercharge Your No-Code Workflows with n8n When it comes to no-code automation, most people think of Zapier or Make. But there’s a rising star every no-code builder should know about: n8n. 👉 Why n8n? Open-source freedom – You can host it yourself, customize it endlessly, and never feel locked in. Powerful workflows – Go beyond basic “if-this-then-that” logic with branching, loops, and conditions. Connect anything – With 400+ integrations (and counting), n8n links your favorite apps, APIs, and databases. AI-ready – Build smart automations that combine GPT, data, and custom triggers in just a few clicks. ✨ Example: Imagine getting a Slack alert every time a new lead fills out a form, automatically enriching their data with AI, and saving it straight into your CRM—all without writing code. n8n isn’t just a tool. It’s a playground for automation enthusiasts and a superpower for businesses that want more flexibility than traditional no-code platforms allow. ⚡ If you’ve hit limits with Zapier or Make, it mi

Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InUpCodo Digital5.039 ReviewsVerifiedVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewsPortfolioVisit websiteTransforming Ideas into Apps and Powerful Brands.UpCodo – Transforming Ideas into Apps and Powerful Brands. UpCodo is a top-rated Web App and Mobile App Development Company based in Noida, India, dedicated to building scalable, high-performance, and user-centric digital solutions. With a strong focus on AI-powered application development, our mission is to help startups, SMEs, and enterprises transform their ideas into powerful, growth-oriented digital products. At UpCodo, we combine creativity, technology, and strategy to deliver solutions that align with business objectives and enhance user experience. Our in-house team of developers, designers, and strategists ensures every project meets the highest quality standards and delivers measurable results. 🌐 Our Core Services Custom Web App Development & Custom Software Development. Full-stack web development using modern frameworks like React.js, Next.js, Django, Laravel, Node.js, and more. We specialize in building SaaS products, enterprise web apps, dashboards, and progressive web apps (PWAs). Turn your legacy system into a cloud based application. AI-Powered Mobile App Development: From concept to deployment, we build hybrid and native mobile apps using Flutter, React Native, Kotlin, Swift, and AI integration for enhanced personalization and automation. UI/UX Design: We design intuitive, visually stunning interfaces focused on delivering seamless user experiences across web and mobile platforms. E-commerce & Marketplace Development: Scalable online store and marketplace solutions with secure payment integrations, advanced search, and performance optimization. MVP & Startup Solutions: End-to-end MVP development for startups to validate ideas faster with minimal cost, built on agile and scalable architecture. We Offer Customization and Integration Services for Leading Third-Party Software: Odoo Customization Salesforce Customization & API Integration. Zoho Customization & API Integration. HubSpot CRM Customization QuickBooks Accounting System API Integration. GoHighLevel CRM API Integration. ⚙️ Technologies We Work With Mobile Application Development: We develop Hybrid / Cross-Platform Mobile applications using React Native CLI / EXPO , REDUX. Flutter / Dart . Native Mobile Applications using: iOS (SWIFT), Android JAVA - Kotlin. Industries We Serve Healthcare Finance Retail & E-commerce Education Travel & Tourism Real Estate Media & Entertainment Automotive Lifestyle Productivity Beauty Communication Healthcare Finance Retail & E-commerce Education Travel & Tourism Real Estate Media & Entertainment Automotive Lifestyle Productivity Beauty Communication Discuss Your Project OUR LATEST BLOGS 01 Jul 2026 How to Hire Dedicated Developers in 2026: Cost, Models & Hiring Checklist If organizations plan to hire dedicated developers in 2026 they then enter a market shaped by senior scarcity, AI output, and nearshore preference. Hiring is higher than usual. The numbers show 74% of developers say finding a job remains difficult. Senior hiring grew 19%, Lead roles 22%, Junior only 9%. The supply skews hard toward experienced engineers. Meanwhile, 90% of developers now use AI assistants. AI writes roughly 29% of the code and 67% say the pressure to ship faster has increased. The current situation has also made budgets tight, expectations climb. Early-2026 research links nearshore work to higher success rates, better quality, less PM overhead, fewer communication breakdowns than far-offshore setups. Methodology, not geography, moves the cost needle most. A 2008 trust study also found communication improves when trust is present. It reduces opportunistic behavior. How should planning be handled? Teams that hire dedicated developers without documenting scope report higher rework, so successful briefs define a 90-day outcome and list features, integrations, and compliance needs, then select from three engagemen

Our proven approach ensures you get a product that’s market-ready, budget-friendly, and future-proof, without the headaches of traditional development cycles. Book a Free Consultation Get a Free Quote Our Software Development Services At Naveck, we deliver end-to-end software development solutions tailored for startups, SMEs, and enterprises. Explore our key areas of expertise: Custom Software Development We build scalable and secure custom software solutions that fit your unique business needs. From enterprise applications to startup MVPs, we ensure innovation meets functionality. Learn More SaaS Development Launch and scale your SaaS product with our expertise in cloud-native platforms, subscription models, and seamless integrations. We help you go from concept to market-ready SaaS quickly. Learn More AI & Machine Learning Solutions Leverage AI-driven insights to automate workflows, improve decision-making, and deliver personalized customer experiences. Our team works with cutting-edge ML frameworks to future-proof your business. Learn More Mobile App Development From intuitive UI/UX to robust performance, we design and build iOS and Android apps that drive engagement and retention. Learn More Cloud & DevOps Services Accelerate innovation with cloud migration, DevOps automation, and CI/CD pipelines. We ensure your applications are scalable, cost-efficient, and secure. Learn More Web Development From responsive websites to complex web applications, we craft secure, high-performing, and scalable web solutions that deliver seamless user experiences. Learn More Talk to Our Experts Today We Helped 850+ Companies Enhance Their IT Products Why Choose Naveck Over Other Software Companies We’re more than developers — we’re partners in your growth journey. Here’s why startups and SMEs choose Naveck Startup & SME-Centric Approach We understand budget constraints, speed requirements, and market pressures. 80% of our clients are startups or SMEs, so we know how to deliver high-impact software fast. Proven MVP & SaaS Delivery From idea to launch, our team has successfully built dozens of MVPs and scalable SaaS platforms, enabling clients to raise funding, acquire customers, and grow efficiently. Flexible Engagement Models Whether you need a dedicated remote team, full project delivery, or a hybrid approach, we adapt to your needs — ensuring maximum flexibility and ROI. End-to-End Expertise in Modern Tech We cover the full spectrum: Web & Mobile Apps, AI/ML, IoT, Cloud, and DevOps — all under one roof, reducing risk and accelerating timelines. Transparent, Founder-Friendly Process Unlike large agencies, we maintain open communication, milestone-based delivery, and real accountability — so you always know the progress and value of your investment. Real Results, Not Just Code Our focus is on impact, efficiency, and measurable growth. From reducing operational costs to improving customer engagement, we deliver outcomes that matter. Let’s Build Your Next Software Project Client Success Stories Recent Projects S3 Design S3 Design required a professional digital portfolio to showcase expertise in sports… Read More Recent Projects Food Delivery App The food delivery app enables users to browse restaurants, place orders… Read More Recent Projects Maiomi – E-commerce Maiomi is a US based e-commerce platform offering digital printable designs and custom style apparel for men, women, and kids. Naveck Technologies developed a scalable e-commerce solution… Read More See More Case Studies What Our Clients Say Naveck helped us launch on time with a clean, scalable product foundation. Rahul Mehta Founder, Fintech Startup The IoT solution they built helped us track and optimize our logistics in real time. We’ve reduced delays by 25%. Anita Verma Operations Head, Logistics Firm As an SME, budget was our biggest concern. Naveck delivered a high-quality web app that perfectly fit our needs without overspending. James Carter CEO, Retail SME We hired dedicated developers from Naveck, and it felt like they were part of our in-house team. Communication and delivery were seamless. Sophia Zhang CTO, Healthcare SaaS Company Our Tech Stack The cornerstone of custom enterprise software development is investing in a tech stack to fully modernize operations and provide a smooth UX. With our embedded tech expertise and deep understanding, our team is committed to delivering great user experiences. description.value: Build a free AI-powered portfolio or business website in 5 minutes. Trusted by students, freelancers, tutors & small businesses across India. No coding needed.

sections.homepage: ItIsMe is a free AI-powered portfolio and business website builder for students, freelancers, tutors and small businesses in India. Created by V2S Infosystem Private Limited, 2/352 Subhash Nagar, New Delhi 110027, India. Website: https://itisme.in/. No coding required. Free plan available. AI chat assistant included on all plans. Custom personal URL: itisme.in/yourname. Sections: About, Skills, Projects, Services, Products, Blog, Contact, Resume PDF. Support: support@itisme.in, +91 8375012908. Chat with us Demo Features How It Works Packages Blog Use Cases Free Website Builder Low Cost Website Free Website for Students Free Website for Freelancers Free Website for Tutors Free Business Website Get Started Free AI-Powered Portfolio & Business Website Builder अपनी डिजिटल पहचान बनाइए Build your portfolio or small-business website in 5 minutes — no coding needed, with a built-in AI chat assistant. Loved by students, freelancers, tutors and home-based entrepreneurs across India. Check Your Domain Availability www.itisme.in/ Check Get Started Free Watch Demo No credit card required Setup in 5 minutes AI chat assistant included 81289+ Active Portfolios 163179+ Projects Showcased 135782+ Blog Posts 99% Satisfaction Rate Analytics 1.2K visitors AI Chat How can I help? Sure! I'll assist... Image Upload Uploading... 83% Products + Added ⬤ Live Blog Published Services Updated live Mobile Management Manage Your Website From Android Update your portfolio, services, products, blogs and AI assistant directly from your Android application. Your website is no longer tied to a laptop or desktop dashboard. Capture photos, upload content, edit services, publish blogs and manage AI responses directly from your Android device. Instant Photo Upload Capture and publish instantly. Blog Publishing Write and publish blogs directly. Product Management Add and update products anytime. AI Assistant Control Manage AI knowledge and responses. Services Management Update services in real time. Real-Time Updates Changes appear instantly on your website. Why Choose ItIsMe for Your Free AI Portfolio Website? The smarter way to build your online presence in India — no coding, no hosting bill, no waiting Building a professional website used to need a web developer, a hosting plan and months of setup. ItIsMe changes that completely. Any student, freelancer, tutor or small business owner in India can create a complete, AI-powered website in under 5 minutes — free. No technical knowledge. No domain purchase. No server configuration. Your ItIsMe website has real pages — About, Skills, Projects, Services, Products, Blog and a Contact form. It is fully mobile-responsive, loads fast on Indian networks, and lives at one clean link: itisme.in/yourname. The built-in AI chat assistant works 24×7, answering visitor questions in real time from the information you provide — whether a recruiter asks about your notice period or a customer asks about product availability. What you get — starting free AI Chat Assistant — answers visitor queries 24×7, automatically Personal URL — itisme.in/yourname, live after approval Multi-page website — not just a links page; a complete site Mobile responsive — looks great on every screen and browser Resume PDF — download and share your profile in one click ₹0 to start — free plan, no credit card needed ItIsMe in Action — Full 11-Minute Product Walkthrough Watch a complete demo showing how you can create your own AI-powered portfolio or business website — step by step. Create My Website Now Live & Interactive Try Live Demo — No Sign Up Needed Explore a real portfolio website and experience the AI chat assistant responding to visitor queries automatically. Explore Demo Website Try AI Chat Demo No account needed — explore freely and see exactly what your visitors will experience. Everything You Need to Build Your AI Portfolio or Business Website One platform — all the tools to build a powerful online presence in India AI Chat Assistant Automatically answer visitor questions about your services, products or skills — 24/7. Multi Page Portfolio Create pages like About, Work, Services, Blog, Shop and Contact — all in one place. Product Showcase Display products with description, images and inquiry option for potential buyers. Blog Section Share your thoughts, stories and knowledge with your audience to build authority. Resume Upload Upload your resume and share your complete digital profile easily with one link. Admin Dashboard Control everything — content, colors, theme and AI responses — from one dashboard. Start Building For Free Who Can Use ItIsMe? Students, Freelancers & Small Businesses Built for anyone in India who wants a professional online presence — for free Students Create a digital resume and showcase projects, skills and achievements to recruiters. Freelancers Display services, portfolio and allow clients to contact you easily from any device. Tutors Show teaching services and allow students to send inquiries or book sessions. Small Business Owners Display products and services professionally online without a technical team. Professionals Build a credible online identity to attract better job and collaboration opportunities. Personal Branding Create your own identity online and share one clean link everywhere you go. ItIsMe vs Other Options — Why We Are Different See how ItIsMe compares to popular alternatives for Indian students, freelancers and small businesses ItIsMe vs Linktree Linktree gives you a single page of links. ItIsMe gives you a full multi-page website with AI chat, blog, products and a contact form — all on a professional personal URL. Full website, not just a links page AI chat assistant included Blog + products + contact form Free plan available ItIsMe vs WordPress WordPress needs a hosting provider, plugins, security updates and technical maintenance. ItIsMe is instant, fully managed and free to start — no server required. No hosting purchase needed No plugins or manual updates Live in 5 minutes AI built-in, not a plugin ItIsMe vs Wix / Squarespace Wix and Squarespace are expensive for India and require design time. ItIsMe is built for the Indian market, starts free and includes an AI assistant from day one. Priced in Indian rupees (₹/year) No design skills required AI chat assistant on all plans Instant setup, no drag-and-drop complexity Try ItIsMe Free Today Ready to create your website? Check if your preferred domain name is available and register in minutes. Create My Website Ask on WhatsApp How to Create Your Free AI Portfolio Website — 5 Easy Steps Get your AI-powered portfolio or business website live in 5 simple steps 1. Register & Choose Domain Sign up and pick your unique domain key (e.g., www.itisme.in/yourname). Check availability instantly. 2. Itisme Approval Our team reviews your registration (usually within 24 hours) to ensure quality and prevent spam. 3. Receive Credentials Get your login credentials via email with your personalized login URL. 4. Build Your Portfolio Use our intuitive dashboard to add projects, blog posts, products, services and configure your AI assistant. 5. Go Live! Your professional portfolio is now live at your custom URL. Share it with the world! Simple, Transparent Pricing — Free to Start, Upgrade Anytime All plans include AI chat assistant, custom domain & mobile-responsive design Basic ₹0 /year Basic portfolio package for individual users Custom subdomain 5 Projects 5 Blog Posts Unlimited Gallery Images No E-commerce Services Page Contact Form Choose Basic Most Popular Professional ₹999 /year Professional package with e-commerce capabilities Custom subdomain 50 Projects 100 Blog Posts 200 Gallery Images 100 Products Services Page Contact Form Choose Professional Enterprise ₹1,999 /year Enterprise package with unlimited features Custom subdomain 999 Projects 999 Blog Posts 999 Gallery Images 999 Products Services Page Contact Form Choose Enterprise Latest Updates What's New on itisme.in Recent improvement

sections.homepage: Platforms LIRA — The AIVeda Platform Private AI Secure AI foundation inside your environment. Private LLM Development Build and deploy your own private large language model. Small Language Models Cost-efficient models optimized for production workflows. Secure RAG Systems Knowledge copilots with citations and access control. AI Governance & Compliance Auditability, RBAC, policy alignment, evaluation frameworks. Deployment Models On-prem, VPC, and hybrid deployment patterns. Accelerators Enterprise Knowledge Intelligence Compliance & Document Intelligence Multisensory Vision & Safety Conversational Agent Platform Vision AI & Edge Intelligence GenAI Content Generation Services Executive Intelligence Dashboards C-suite insights from enterprise data and secure AI interpretation. Private AI Strategy & Advisory AI readiness audit, use case discovery, pilot to production roadmap. Private LLM Engineering Custom LLM build, fine-tuning, evaluation, red teaming. Small Model Engineering Model compression, inference optimization, cost reduction. Secure Deployment & MLOps Monitoring, drift detection, lifecycle management. Data Services Pipelines, warehousing, governance, BI and analytics enablement. AI Integration & Automation CRM, ERP integrations and workflow orchestration. Predictive Intelligence & Forecasting Demand forecasting, predictive maintenance, anomaly detection. Industries Manufacturing Private AI for safety, quality, plant intelligence, and operations. Healthcare PHI-safe AI copilots, documentation, and compliance automation. Finance & BFSI Private AI for compliance, risk, auditability, and governance. Telecom AI for customer ops, network intelligence, and anomaly detection. Resources Blog Technical insights on private AI, LLMs, and SLMs. Case Studies Real deployments, outcomes, and architecture highlights. FAQs Clear answers for buyers evaluating private AI. Company About AIVeda Mission, positioning, and enterprise focus. Careers Build private AI systems with our team. Contact Speak with AIVeda. Not expose it. AIVeda designs and deploys Private Large Language Models, Small Language Models, and secure enterprise AI infrastructure that operates entirely within your environment. No external data leakage. No uncontrolled experimentation. No vendor dependency. Production-grade AI designed for long-term enterprise stability. The Enterprise AI Reality Public LLMs transformed accessibility. But enterprises operate under stricter requirements. Open AI adoption introduces systemic risks to your backbone. Data sovereignty concerns Compliance exposure Unpredictable token-based pricing Limited governance control Lack of audit transparency Vendor lock-in risks Strategic Autonomy Roadmap: Governance by Design AI deployed without architectural discipline becomes an operational risk. Secure Deployment Secure model deployment & Infrastructure scalability. Domain Intelligence Domain-trained intelligence with predictable costs. Private AI is no longer optional. It is foundational. Private LLM Development AIVeda builds fully secure, enterprise-grade Private Large Language Models deployed within on-premise, VPC, or hybrid environments. What We Deliver Custom LLM training on proprietary data Secure Retrieval-Augmented Generation frameworks Role-based access controls Audit logging and traceability Evaluation pipelines and model observability Enterprise system integrations Business Outcomes Complete data control Improved domain accuracy Reduced compliance risk Lower long-term infrastructure cost Enterprise-grade reliability Your LLM. Your control. Your competitive advantage. Optimized For Faster inference Reduced computational overhead Controlled deterministic outputs High-accuracy task-specific performance Predictable cost structures Small Language Models for Production Efficiency Large models are not always efficient for enterprise workflows. AIVeda develops Small Language Models optimized for production deployment. SLMs power: Compliance automation Document classification Internal copilots Workflow assistants Lead scoring systems Smaller models. Greater control. Enterprise stability. Explore Small Language Model Deployment Options Enterprise AI Architecture & Secure Deployment AI without infrastructure discipline fails in production. We design enterprise-grade AI ecosystems, not isolated tools. Deployment Models On-premise AI clusters Full physical control over the ecosystem backbone. VPC-based private cloud infrastructure Isolated compute instances within your chosen provider. Hybrid multi-region architectures Redundant, distributed autonomy for global operations. Secure internal API frameworks Standardized consumption across business units. Containerized microservices deployment Portable, scalable architecture designed for resilience. Governance Embedded Data segmentation frameworks Enforcing strict boundaries between model training sets. Role-based access management Granular permissions for model fine-tuning and inference. Continuous monitoring systems Real-time oversight of strategic performance metrics. Drift detection and performance auditing Automated checks against model decay and bias. Compliance mapping for regulated industries Audit-ready documentation for FINRA, HIPAA, or GDPR. AI must be production-ready before it scales. AI Accelerators for Enterprise Use Cases Accelerators reduce time-to-value while maintaining enterprise security integrity. All built on Private AI foundations. Multisensory AI Vision Real-time visual analysis Defect detection & QA Workplace safety monitoring Hazard detection Intelligent document reading Drone-integrated analytics Agentic AI Systems Lead qualification automation Interview intelligence Call center AI agents Structured workflow orchestration Custom Enterprise GPT Executive dashboards Secure internal copilots Customer-facing systems Augmented Content Enterprise blog automation Brand-consistent generation Governance-aligned workflows Predictive ML Demand forecasting Risk scoring & Anomaly detection Operational optimization From Pilot to Enterprise-Scale Production AI adoption fails when pilots do not translate to production. Our Pilot-to-Production framework ensures structured execution: 01 Use-case validation 02 Secure architecture design 03 Controlled pilot environment 04 Performance hardening 05 Enterprise-wide rollout No experimental shortcuts.No shadow AI systems. Request a Pilot-to-Production Assessment AI Governance and Responsible Intelligence Responsible AI is not a policy document. It is an architectural decision. AIVeda embeds governance directly into system design. We Enable Transparent model explainability Understanding why models reach specific conclusions. Controlled user access Mapping AI interactions to corporate identity systems. Structured data lineage Tracking every piece of information fed to the model. Compliance-ready logging Automatic reporting for internal and external audits. Secure knowledge retrieval Protected vector databases for RAG-based systems. AI must withstand enterprise audits. sections.homepage: Toggle navigation Services Portfolio Team Testimonial Our Expertise career Contact Book Your Meeting Hire Us WE create awesome WEB & MOBILE APPS We, at Decabits Software put mammoth effort into aligning our work with client expectations. With cutting edge technologies, diligence at work, ethical coding practices & a new age environment - our tech savvy team has always managed to deliver top-quality work. Decabits believes in smooth implementation of projects and precise deliverables, for leading the way to tangible & quantifiable results. We recognize the market needs & productively add the needed tech manure to your website - the biggest asset for your business brand. Grow big with us and empower your goals with customized mobile apps, created by our skilled developers. Services We are a startup incubator, delivering quality results using Agile methodologies and Test Driven Development.. Web Designing We build websites which are easy to load & navigate and are responsive in nature. Our websites provide exceptional user experience and support all screen sizes. We use atomic design methodology to publish the best possible results. Web App Development We develop scalable web applications, capable of handling hefty traffic (in millions) at a time. Our offerings include cloud-based web apps on Amazon Web Services (AWS)/Google. We provide hosting on cloud-based solutions. Mobile App Development We provide mobile application development across iOS and Android platforms with agile UI/UX solutions. We also offer cross platform app development. Customer Rate Optimization We offer customer rate optimization across to our clients in order to increase their conversion and uplift their revenue so that they can successfully expand business globally. About DataSlexIndia India’s Trusted Multi-Process IT Outsourcing Partner Founded in 2008, DataSlexIndia began with a simple goal – to help businesses grow by taking care of their non-essential tasks with precision and reliability. From a small team in Delhi, we have grown into a trusted outsourcing partner for 3500+ clients worldwide. With 18+ years of experience and 5000+ successful projects delivered, we continue to empower businesses with scalable, efficient and cost-effective solutions. As our clients have grown, so have we. Today, we provide everything from Data Entry and Virtual Assistance to AI Solutions, Web & App Development, Digital Marketing and Back Office Support. No matter the project, our goal remains the same—to become a reliable part of your team and deliver work you can count on, every single time. At DataSlexIndia, we believe in long-term partnerships built on trust, transparency and results that drive real business impact. WHY CHOOSE US Why Businesses Choose DataSlexIndia Discover what makes us the trusted outsourcing partner for businesses across the globe. Client First Approach We understand your goals and deliver solutions that put your success first. Quality Commitment We follow strict quality processes to ensure accuracy and reliability. Data Security Your data is protected with advanced security and complete confidentiality. Global Delivery We serve clients across the globe with scalable and flexible engagement models. Expert Team Our experienced professionals are dedicated to delivering value and driving growth. Cost Efficient We help you reduce costs without compromising on quality. Our Services Get access to experienced professionals, dedicated teams, and reliable digital solutions tailored to your business goals. From AI-powered solutions to virtual assistance and software development, we help businesses reduce costs and accelerate growth. 01 AI Solutions Leverage AI-powered tools and automation to streamline workflows, improve accuracy and boost productivity. Read More > 02 Virtual Assistant Get professional virtual assistants to handle your daily tasks and save valuable time.   Read More > 03 Data Entry Accurate and reliable data entry services to keep your business organized and efficient.   Read More > 04 eCommerce Management End-to-end store management to optimize operations and maximize sales.   Read More > 05 Back Office Support Comprehensive back office support to streamline your business operations.   Read More > 06 Photo Editing High-quality image editing and retouching to make your visuals stand out.   Read More > 07 Web Development Custom websites that are responsive, fast and built to grow your business online.   Read More > 08 App Development Mobile apps that deliver seamless experiences and drive customer engagement.   Read More > 09 Digital Marketing Data-driven marketing strategies to increase your online visibility and growth.   Read More > CLIENT TESTIMONIALS What Our Clients Say Real stories from real clients who have experienced growth, efficiency, and success with DataSlexIndia.  Christopher Anderson President & CEO of Any Lab Test Now DataSlexIndia has become an extension of our team. Their attention to detail, quick turnaround times, and commitment to quality have helped us streamline several back-office processes. Liz Westlake CEO of StitchyBox We hired a dedicated virtual assistant through DataSlexIndia and were impressed from day one. Communication was excellent, tasks were completed accurately, and productivity improved significantly. Derek Applegate Executive Director of Beyond How To Consulting The team consistently delivers high-quality data entry and research work. Their reliability and responsiveness make them one of our most trusted outsourcing partners. Tyler M. IT Head of Present Momentum We needed a cost-effective team for ongoing administrative support, and DataSlexIndia exceeded expectations. Their dedication and accuracy have been exceptional. FAQ You Ask, We Answer. Everything you need to know about our outsourcing services, hiring process, security, and pricing – all in one place. Still have questions? Talk To Our Experts Still have questions? Talk to us What services does DataSlexIndia provide? DataSlexIndia offers a wide range of outsourcing solutions including AI Solutions, Virtual Assistant Services, Data Entry, eCommerce Management, Back Office Support, Photo Editing, Web Development, App Development, and Digital Marketing. Our goal is to help businesses reduce operational costs while improving productivity and scalability. How can outsourcing help my business grow? Outsourcing allows you to focus on your core business activities while experienced professionals handle time-consuming operational tasks. This helps reduce overhead costs, improve efficiency, and accelerate business growth without the expense of hiring full-time in-house staff. Can I hire a dedicated virtual assistant or team? Yes. We offer dedicated Virtual Assistants and offshore teams based on your business requirements. Whether you need support for administration, customer service, data management, research, or eCommerce operations, we can provide skilled professionals who work as an extension of your team. How do you ensure data security and confidentiality? We take data security seriously. Client information is handled through secure systems, restricted access controls, confidentiality agreements, and established operational procedures to ensure your business data remains protected throughout the project lifecycle. Do you offer a free consultation or free trial? Yes. We offer a free consultation to understand your requirements and recommend the most suitable solution. Depending on the project scope, we may also provide a small trial task so you can evaluate our quality, communication, and delivery standards before making a long-term commitment. How do we communicate and track project progress? We maintain regular communication through email, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Slack, WhatsApp, or your preferred platform. Depending on the project, we can provide daily, weekly, or monthly progress reports to ensure complete transparency and accountability. Do you provide flexible pricing and engagement models? Yes. We offer flexible engagement options

Execution is. The gap between what your business needs and what most vendors actually deliver is where growth stalls, budgets burn, and timelines quietly double. Brainstack Technologies exists to close that gap — as a software engineering firm that delivers working code, not just slide decks.Engineering delivery partner since 2016Delivered ResultsOutcomes From Real EngagementsPulled from our published case studies — sourced outcomes, not marketing estimates.14+ hrs/wkof manual reconciliation removedCustom platform buildCustom software case study →Weeks → hoursgeospatial processing, per regionAutomated data pipelineData engineering case study →Manual → automatedcertification document extractionHuman-in-the-loop AIAI & ML case study →45 min → 4 mindeploy time, zero downtimeMonolith → 7 servicesMicroservices case study →Full-Stack CapabilitiesTech We Ship in Production, Not on SlidesBrainstack is a full-stack software development company. We build with the stacks our clients can hire for after we hand the codebase over — never with house frameworks that lock them in. Engineering teams are full-stack on TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, Python, and Java; data teams on Databricks, PySpark, dbt, and Airflow; mobile teams on React Native and Flutter; infra teams on AWS-first Terraform with Kubernetes (EKS) for stateful workloads.MEAN / MERN stackTypeScriptPythonJavaReact NativeFlutterAWSTerraformDelivery ModelOne Team. Two Time Zones. No Offshore Surprises.Stand-ups run at 09:00 AEST so your team gets a four-hour overlap with engineering every business day. Production code is deployed into your AWS account (Sydney region for AU data-residency, Mumbai if your workload is India-side). Source code lives in your Git org from day one.Industries ReimaginedDomains We ServeWe deliver solutions across financial services, healthcare, agritech & sustainability, edtech, telecom & connected systems, smart energy, e-commerce, and governance & compliance — meeting the regulatory, compliance, and operational requirements of each.Discuss Your Industry RequirementsFinancial ServicesReal-time data pipelines and regulatory reporting automation for asset managers and wealth platforms.HealthcareHIPAA-aware clinical workflow platforms with compliance-first architecture and full audit trails.AgriTech & SustainabilityOffline-capable field data collection and EUDR supply chain traceability deployed across three continents.Agritech Platform Offline-First Apps EdTechScalable assessment engines and learning platforms handling thousands of concurrent sessions.Telecom & Connected SystemsHigh-volume telemetry ingestion, device management, and real-time operational dashboards.Smart EnergyConsumption analytics and predictive maintenance integrated with smart meter APIs.E-CommerceHeadless commerce backends, payment integrations, and conversion-optimised shopping experiences.Governance & ComplianceMulti-language survey platforms and audit systems tracking sustainability indicators across global supply chains.Our AchievementsIndustry-Recognised Engineering TeamsRecognised across Clutch, GoodFirms, and Google Reviews for software delivery, QA, data engineering, and product development.Custom Software DevelopmentView StoryMobile DevelopmentView StoryMicroservices ArchitectureView StoryData EngineeringView StoryProduct EngineeringView StoryAI & Machine LearningView StoryPortfolio ManagementView StoryService ModelEngagement ModelsWe tailor delivery to your team structure and ownership preference. description.value: ANSI Technologies delivers Salesforce, Zoho and Odoo implementation, integrations, automation and SLA-based managed support—plus cybersecurity and IT infrastructure services. Delivery hubs in UAE and India.

sections.homepage: IND +91 99011 66331 | UAE +971 528089931 [email protected] Delhi | Bengaluru | Dubai Home About Us Industries Our Services Salesforce Salesforce Implementation Salesforce Development Salesforce Integration Salesforce Maintenance & Support Agentforce – Agentic AI Engine SAP Consulting SAP Implementation SAP Support SAP Upgrade & Migration SAP ECC Implementation & Support SAP S4 HANA Solutions SAP Business One Solutions Business Consulting Managed IT Services Data Protection & Privacy Digital Risk Compliance Security Assessment Services AI Automation AI Agentic Workflows AI Agents RPA – Bot Automation Business Process Automation Microsoft Services Power BI Analytics Power Automate Copilot in Finance Microsoft Security Microsoft O365 Solutions Dynamics ERP CRM Zoho Zoho ERP Zoho CRM Zoho One Zoho HRMS Zoho Books Zoho Projects Zoho Implementation Zoho Customization Zoho Automation Zoho Customer Support Odoo Consulting Odoo Implementation Odoo Customization Odoo Support Odoo Adoption IT Infrastructure Backup & DR Solutions Cloud Solutions Server & Network VAPT Services Wireless Solutions IT Infra OEM Coverage Cyber Security Cyber Security Home Cyber Security Services Cyber Security Products HRMS Software Solution CTO - On Demand Our Products + WhatsApp Order Management - AI Driven Asset Management Software Digital Servant Smart QR Code Software Portfolio Blogs Contact Us WhatsApp Request a Proposal CRM & ERP Implementation, Integrations & Managed Support for High-Growth Teams We modernize revenue and operations with clear blueprints, clean data migration, secure integrations, workflow automation, dashboards, and SLA-based managed support—so teams sell faster, serve better, and scale confidently. Platforms we frequently deliver: Salesforce, Zoho, and Odoo. If you’re evaluating options, we help you select the right-fit stack based on process, scale, and ROI. Global delivery model with coordination and delivery hubs in UAE and India (supporting GCC, US, Australia & beyond). Request a Proposal Salesforce Zoho Odoo Blueprint → Go-Live (fast) Clean migration Secure integrations KPI dashboards Transform Your Business with CRM/ERP Excellence Implement Salesforce, Zoho and Odoo with best-practice architecture, adoption-first design, and measurable outcomes. Get Started Today Integrations + Automation for Productivity Connect CRM/ERP with websites, HRMS, finance and marketing tools—then automate workflows using AI and RPA. Integrations AI Automation Managed Support You Can Rely On SLA-based managed services, enhancement cycles, monitoring, optimization—plus cybersecurity and IT infrastructure support. Managed Support Cybersecurity Why Choose ANSI Technologies We focus on what drives measurable business outcomes. Our core expertise is CRM and ERP implementation and managed support—strengthened by integrations, automation, and security to ensure scale, reliability, and adoption. Adoption-First Delivery We design for real users—clean screens, consistent stages, frictionless flows and role-based dashboards. Integration Excellence Secure APIs, predictable sync patterns, monitoring and documentation so integrations stay stable. Automation & AI Workflow automation, approvals, routing, RPA and AI patterns to reduce manual work and improve cycle time. Governance & Security Controls, security-first delivery and best practices that support compliance and operational reliability. Request a Proposal Mission and Vision Vision Be the trusted choice for customers by offering valuable technology and talent-based solutions. Mission To provide high-quality solutions and services that enhance customer value, guided by intellect, innovation, and unwavering integrity. CRM/ERP Platforms We Implement & Support Whether you are modernizing sales pipelines, building a customer service operation, integrating marketing journeys, or digitizing finance and operations—platform choice matters. We help you implement the right platform and make it work in the real world: data quality, adoption, integrations, automation, reporting and ongoing improvements. Salesforce CRM Salesforce implementation, customization, integrations, managed support and continuous optimization for sales, service and marketing teams. Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud Data migration, dashboards, workflow automation API integrations with ERP, websites, marketing tools Explore Salesforce Zoho Ecosystem Zoho CRM and business applications implementation for growth-focused teams—fast adoption, clean pipelines and strong reporting. Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk Zoho People / HR workflows (if applicable) Automation, integrations, dashboards and training Explore Zoho Odoo ERP Odoo implementation and integrations for operations—finance, inventory, procurement, sales and service workflows aligned with your business model. ERP blueprinting, configuration and go-live Custom modules (only when truly needed) Integrations and data migration support Explore Odoo Request Proposal Our Expertise A strong implementation is not only about configuring modules. It is about aligning your process, data, adoption and governance so the system becomes a reliable operating layer for your business. AI & RPA Automation Reduce repetitive work with workflow automation, RPA and AI-assisted processes for faster execution and better data accuracy. Salesforce Delivery Salesforce consulting, build and support with best practices for reporting, security, role design, and scalable enhancements. ERP & Operations Odoo and operations alignment—blueprint, configuration, integration patterns, and training for operational teams. Managed Services SLA-based support, admin coverage, enhancement backlog, monitoring and release management after go-live. Cybersecurity Security assessment, governance and protection strategies that reduce risk and strengthen reliability. IT Infrastructure Infrastructure, endpoint, email and network foundations that ensure operational stability for your platforms. Get in Touch Our Solutions HRMS Implementation Streamline HR workflows, approvals and employee operations with a modern HRMS implementation aligned to your business needs. Read More Artificial Intelligence AI-based solutions designed to enhance automation and deliver actionable insights for business teams. Read More Cyber Security Reliable security services that protect sensitive information and uphold the integrity of your network infrastructure. Read More Analytics & BI Turn complex data into decisions with dashboards, BI tools and reporting that leaders can trust. Read More RPA Automate repetitive workflows and improve execution speed using robotic process automation. Read More IT Infrastructure Network, endpoint and cloud foundations that keep your systems secure, scalable and reliable. Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InANSI Technologies4.71 ReviewVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewVisit websiteTechnology Advancement at your fingertipsANSI Technologies is a full‑service technology consulting and solutions provider that helps businesses achieve digital transformation, manage IT infrastructure, implement automation, leverage analytics, and adopt tailored enterprise software. Their mission is to deliver value-driven, high-quality solutions built on innovation, integrity, and excellence. (ansiconsult.com) Serving startups, SMEs, and large enterprises, ANSI acts as a strategic technology partner — combining deep technical expertise, industry knowledge, and flexible services to meet diverse business needs. Services & Offerings ANSI’s solutions cover a wide spectrum of IT and business technology needs: ERP & CRM Solutions — Implementation and support for enterprise resource planning and customer relationship management systems like SAP, Salesforce, Zoho, and Odoo, enabling efficient management of operations, finance, sales, and customer interactions. Enterprise-grade ERP (SAP) — Full-cycle SAP deployment, including migration, configuration, integration, and ongoing support across industries such as manufacturing, retail, finance, logistics, and education. CRM / Salesforce & Related Platforms — Custom implementations, workflow automation, system integration, and maintenance to optimize customer engagement. AI & Automation (RPA/BPA) — Intelligent process automation using RPA, AI-powered workflows, and bots across HR, finance, supply chain, and customer service. IT Infrastructure & Managed Services — Comprehensive IT support including network setup, cloud infrastructure management, system administration, security, backups, maintenance, and outsourced IT operations. Cloud Solutions & Migration — Cloud architecture design, workload migration (public/private/hybrid), cloud operations management, compliance, cost optimization, disaster recovery, and ongoing support. Cybersecurity & Data Protection — Threat detection, endpoint and network security, SOC, vulnerability assessments, audits, data protection, encryption, and compliance solutions. Analytics & Business Intelligence (BI) — Data analytics, reporting, and BI solutions to drive actionable insights and informed decision-making. Industry Coverage ANSI Technologies serves diverse sectors including healthcare, finance, manufacturing, logistics, retail/e-commerce, IT-driven enterprises, education, and service industries requiring ERP, automation, IT infrastructure, or compliance support. Why Choose ANSI Technologies Comprehensive Services — End-to-end solutions from infrastructure and cloud management to ERP/CRM, automation, analytics, and security. Tailored & Scalable Solutions — Customized offerings that grow with businesses of all sizes. Expert & Certified Professionals — Skilled teams in ERP, cloud, security, and automation frameworks delivering professional-grade implementation and support. Security & Compliance Focus — Ensuring data protection and adherence to global/regional standards. Long-Term Support — Full lifecycle engagement, from consulting and strategy to implementation, migration, managed services, and ongoing maintenance. Contact & Presence ANSI Technologies has offices in Dubai, UAE (Dubai Silicon Oasis) and India (New Delhi and Bengaluru), serving clients across the Middle East and Asia. For enquiries, visit their contact page. Summary: ANSI Technologies is a one-stop partner for businesses seeking to modernize operations, IT infrastructure, and digital capabilities. With services spanning cloud, ERP/CRM, automation, security, analytics, and managed IT, ANSI supports enterprise growth, transformation, and long-term stability. description.value: At Cybranex we develop modern products and tech, provide information technology consultant and services in AI Quantum Blockchain.

sections.homepage: top of pageHomeProjectsAIBlockchainQtechQuantum InstrumentsConsultation ProjectsProductsUnicorn SimulatorUrmi AIServicesOur ServicesAbout UsCoursesContact UsTerms and ConditionsBlogMoreUse tab to navigate through the menu items.Log InGet In Touch The Story of CybraneXCybraneX is an Information-technology Consulting Firm with a vision to be the pioneer in the field of modern science and futuristic technologies such as : AI, Quantum computing, IoT and Blockchain. Our passion for excellence has driven us from the beginning, and continues to drive us into the future. The team at CybraneX knows the relevance of technology and its promise for a sustainable future, we strive to make our products relevant to the meaningful progress of society. Our ProjectsAt CybraneX, innovation is the driving force behind every project we undertake. Our multidisciplinary team brings expertise in cutting-edge domains like Quantum, AI and IoT, Blockchain and Physics.CVD DiamondsOur project focuses on exploring the industrial applications of CVD diamonds, particularly in catalyzing the quantum and classical industries.Quantum Optical SimulationWe aim to leverage quantum computing to enable faster and more accurate simulations of complex physical systems, with applications in areas like materials science, chemistry, and beyond.Drug DesignBy leveraging quantum computing, we aim to expedite and enhance the drug discovery process, bringing life-saving treatments to patients in need.TextfulyTextfuly, is a professional content creation tool that uses advanced AI features. By leveraging machine learning and natural language processing, we aim to help users create high-quality, engaging content with greater ease and efficiency.Post-Quantum Cryptography Through our research, we aim to provide robust security solutions to protect sensitive data and communications.Quantum InstrumentsWe offer a unique approach to scientific research by providing all necessary instruments and equipment, along with complete lab setups, to enhance the capabilities of various fields such as materials science, chemistry, and electronics. See all employees Locations Primary 205 E Harmon Ave APT 904 Las Vegas, NV 89169 205 E Harmon Ave APT 904 Las Vegas, NV 89169 Las Vegas, Nevada 89169, US Get directions Updates Goodfirms 9,004 followers 2h Report this post When companies talk about culture, it's usually about perks. At AQe Digital, it's about making difficult decisions. "When behavior and values conflict, values win - even when the behavior is that of a high performer." That philosophy stood out in our conversation with Amit Mehta, Founder & CEO of AQe Digital (Formerly AQe Group). In our latest Goodfirms Leader Insights interview, Amit shares how a values-first culture has helped shape a global technology company serving 500+ clients across 37+ countries and why ownership, accountability, and long-term thinking matter more than ever in the age of AI. If you're interested in leadership that goes beyond technology, this conversation is worth reading. 🔗 Full interview link is in the comments. #Goodfirms #GoodfirmsLeaderInsights #GoodfirmsInterviews #Leadership #CompanyCulture #DigitalTransformation #AI #SoftwareDevelopment #BusinessLeadership #Innovation 11 1 Comment Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 20h Report this post "We’re live!" ...Okay, but how close did the dev team come to crying in the bathroom 48 hours ago? 🥲 The tech ecosystem loves celebrating the "Day Zero" ribbon cutting. The aesthetic office photos, the launch day pastries, the LinkedIn announcement. But let's be real - if your 90 days leading up to launch didn't feel like a high-stakes escape room, your protocol is probably held together by vibes and duct tape. When real capital is on the line, skipping rigorous testing isn’t "moving fast and breaking things" - it's just reckless. You need builders who treat security like their lives depend on it (because their reputation definitely does). We took a look at what actually goes down in a pre-launch war room so you don't have to learn the hard way. 👇 Check the first comment to find and compare verified blockchain developers and smart contract auditors who actually know how to code defensively. #BehindTheBuild #BlockchainDevelopment #DeFi #Web3 #ProjectManagement #Goodfirms …more 6 1 Comment Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 23h Report this post POV: An AI agent just booked a vendor call for you and you find out... in the meeting 😳 Some of us are ready. Some of us still triple-check our own calendar invites. Where do you land? Vote 🗳️ #B2BTech #AIagents #WorkTech #ProductivityHacks #Goodfirms #Poll #LinkedInPoll 1 Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 1d Report this post Some reminders arrive before a decision. Some arrive after accounting has already processed it. Those are different categories of notification. One helps. The other documents history. What's the most hilariously late automated email you've ever received? #SaaS #CustomerExperience #UXDesign #CorporateHumor #TechMemes #ProductDesign #CustomerJourney #BusinessAutomation #GoodFirms #TechHumor #UserExperience #MarketingAutomation 2 1 Comment Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 2d Report this post Every company has that one tool it's still "in a relationship" with out of pure habit. 💀 Auto-renewed. Barely opened. Nobody in the org chart can even explain why it was bought in the first place. We see you & we don’t judge (or do we?) Swipe to see if you can spot your own stack in here 👀 Full link to start browsing verified companies and services across every category is in the comments 👇 #SaaS #TechStack #B2BSoftware #DigitalTransformation #Goodfirms 5 1 Comment Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 2d Report this post If every SEO promise came true... ...every business would be ranking #1 by next month. 😄 The problem isn't that SEO is slow. The problem is that too many conversations start with 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬 instead of 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐲. Good SEO isn't a magic trick. It's a series of smart decisions that build on each other over time. And that's exactly why choosing the right partner matters more than choosing the one with the boldest promise. 🎥 𝐌𝐲𝐭𝐡 𝐯𝐬 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 | 𝐄𝐩𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐝𝐞 𝟐 In this series, we take one widely accepted business belief and ask: "𝐈𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐢𝐭 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝?" 👇 We'd love to hear from you. 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭'𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐮𝐧𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐒𝐄𝐎 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮'𝐯𝐞 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐝? 🚨 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐤 𝐭𝐨 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐄𝐎 𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭. #Goodfirms #MythVsReality #SEO #SearchEngineOptimization #DigitalMarketing #B2BMarketing #BusinessGrowth #MarketingStrategy #MarketingMyths #AgencyLife …more 11 1 Comment Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 2d Report this post 🤖 𝐀𝐈: "This software is flawless and scales perfectly." 👥 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐓𝐞𝐜𝐡 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐝: "Cool. But did the API survive Black Friday, or turn into a smoking crater?" 🌋 AI solved the discovery problem, but it completely broke trust. When every vendor can generate pristine feature lists, everything looks perfect to an algorithm. The plot twist? The faster AI delivers answers, the more valuable raw, unvarnished human proof becomes. Buyers use LLMs to find 5 vendors - but they rely on real peer reviews to choose the one. 👇 Dive into today’s TechBuzz to unlock the new Two-Layer Trust Framework. #B2BSaaS #TechProcurement #AI #Goodfirms #B2BMarketing #SoftwareBuying #EnterpriseTech #TechTrends #ProductManagement #CIO #TechInsights #CIOInsights #SoftwareReviews #TrustEconomy #TechBuzz The Quiet Comeback of Proof Goodfirms on LinkedIn 4 Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 2d Report this post One of the strangest things about AI: It sounds exactly the same when it's 100% correct and when it's confidently inventing something. Humans usually give away uncertainty. AI often doesn't. Which means the skill that's becoming more valuable isn't prompting. It's verification. What's the most convincing AI mistake you've personally caught? #Goodfirms #ArtificialIntelligence #AI #GenerativeAI #AIHallucinations #FactChecking #TechTrends #FutureOfWork #PromptEngineering #AILiteracy #CriticalThinking #TechInsights #ThoughtLeadership 2 3 Comments Like Comment Share Goodfirms 9,004 followers 4d Report this post Somewhere, a procurement team is on 6th hour of a "feature comparison call." description.value:
Neuphony™ | 6,616 followers on LinkedIn. The Smartwatch for Your Brain to unlock it's true potential.
As seen on #SharkTankIndia Season 2 🧠🚀 | Brain Training through #Neurofeedback and Gamified #Meditation for a Healthier Mind!  As Seen On #SharkTankIndia & #Forbes

sections.homepage: Skip to main content LinkedIn Top Content People Learning Jobs Games Get the app Sign in Join now Neuphony™ Wellness and Fitness Services Delhi, Delhi 6,616 followers The Smartwatch for Your Brain to unlock it's true potential. As seen on #SharkTankIndia Season 2 🧠🚀 Follow Discover all 6 employees Report this company About us Brain Training through #Neurofeedback and Gamified #Meditation for a Healthier Mind! As Seen On #SharkTankIndia & #Forbes Website http://neuphony.com External link for Neuphony™ Industry Wellness and Fitness Services Company size 11-50 employees Headquarters Delhi, Delhi Type Privately Held Founded 2020 Products Neuphony Headband Neuphony believes in unlimited potential of human mind and strives toward unlocking it to bring out the best in them. Neurofeedback has been scientifically proven to be a powerful tool to improve the overall health of your brain including improving memory, sleep quality and reducing stress and anxiety. Neuphony brings you the benefits of neurofeedback at the comfort of your home with the help of EEG headband and a mobile application. The headband measures the electrical activity of your brain and the mobile app based on the sensor data recommends you meditation techniques to achieve your desired state. Over sessions it trains your brain on how to achieve the desired state itself. Locations Primary Delhi, Delhi 110087, IN Get directions Employees at Neuphony™ Ankush Tomar Navkaran Singh Snigdha Gairola See all employees Updates Neuphony™ reposted this Ria Rustagi 9mo Edited Report this post I’ve disrupted my team’s sleep to build better sleep habits for my customers, and will happily do it again. . . I could finally see our customers developing habits thanks to data. You ask, how? Our weekly active users, who use the product three or more times a week, have continuously remained at 70%. 20% of users use Boost Mode more than six times per week, making them power users. We were concerned that people might not think of this headphone as anything more than a typical pair of music headphones when we were designing it. We were pleasantly surprised to learn, however, that only 30% of users use Sychedelic as regular headphones, with the remaining 70% using it for Boost Mode. Of that, 50% use it for sleep, and the remaining 20% use it to improve concentration or rejuvenate. That’s when it hit me , we’re not just building great audio, we’re building a habit, one that helps people reset, refocus and rest better every day. And for a founder, that’s the kind of growth graph that truly matters. #Sychedelic #Founders #HabitBuilding #Productivity #FocusBetter #SleepDeeper #MentalHealth #AudioTech +2 51 6 Comments Like Comment Share Neuphony™ reposted this Ria Rustagi 9mo Edited Report this post The technology NASA used to keep astronauts alert through fatigue and stress is the same one being used by Sychedelic. . . Back then, most scientists dismissed transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) as a fad. A few believed it could change how humans learn, recover, and focus. Almost no one believed it could ever leave the lab. We weren’t designing another complicated neurotech product. We were building Headphones++ — sound fused with neuro-stimulation. When we first said we wanted to use stimulation to help people focus faster and relax deeper, we were told: “Impossible.” “Not legal.” “Too complex.” But music and white noise also help, they said. There was no roadmap. No playbook. Only 200+ failed prototypes, late-night solder burns, and a stubborn belief that the brain deserves better than caffeine and chaos. tDCS isn’t a “hack.” It’s a clinically validated neuromodulation method used by NASA, the military, and Harvard labs to prime the brain for performance. It gently stimulates your prefrontal cortex (F3/F4) — the regions that control focus, clarity, and emotional balance. And when paired with our patented AI engine, it does something no other headphone can: it syncs your brain’s electrical rhythm with sound, creating a state of deep alignment between mind, music, and mood. We didn’t invent tDCS. We made it wearable. Safe. Personal. Sychedelic 87 11 Comments Like Comment Share Neuphony™ reposted this Ria Rustagi 9mo Report this post " I FIRED MY CTO AND CPO FOR REAL" . . because they believed that additional features and effort were needed for the product. The problem is that a product should never be flawless. since perfection is a personal opinion. Progress is what counts. Let your customers tell you what the remaining 30% looks like after you launch at 70%. At Sychedelic, we did precisely that. Our CPO and CTO began going to customers in person ( yeah not fired), arranging demos, observing every response, perplexed expression, and "wow" moment during sessions. They would return with notebooks full of minute details, such as how the strap was adjusted, how long it took to use the app, and even which words caused confusion. Now, I simply ask, "Did a customer ask for this, or are we just building because it's cool?" before we construct anything new. It completely changed how we work. Because once the tech team actually saw people using the product, they stopped over-engineering and started simplifying. Of course, there were funny moments too. We had people ask, “Are you sure this is safe?” or “What if the water in that spray bottle runs out?” (It’s literally just tap water 😅). Those little things reminded us that building hardware isn’t just about code and circuits, it’s about how real people experience it. Pulling the tech team out of their zone wasn’t easy. But honestly, those field visits have been the most valuable part of this journey. We didn’t just get feedback; we got perspective. And that’s been the biggest unlock for us, not perfection, just connection. 110 32 Comments Like Comment Share Neuphony™ reposted this Ria Rustagi 9mo Report this post I make my employees dance every morning. . . Yes, you read that right. But the twist is, they only have to dance if they’re late. Now before you say, “Traffic hota hai,” or “Cab late aayi thi,” trust me, we’ve heard it all. That’s why no one gets scolded, no salary gets cut… they just have to walk in dancing on the lock screen. Full Bollywood entry guaranteed. 💃 It started as a joke, but now it’s basically our unofficial warm-up session before deadlines hit. Earlier, the deal was even funnier, if someone came late more than 7 days a month, they had to throw a party for the whole team. 🍕 Because let’s be honest, when you’re working in a startup, 90% of the time you’re stressing about deadlines, targets, and deliverables. But that remaining 10%? That’s where the magic happens. That’s when we’re all in the kitchen at 7 PM making protein shakes together, Or when the tech team decides to play badminton at 11 PM, in the middle of a serious sprint. That’s when laughter replaces stress and chaos feels a little lighter. At Sychedelic, we don’t just build focus-enhancing headphones, we build a culture that reminds us why we started in the first place. Startup life isn’t just about scaling fast. It’s about dancing through the chaos, laughing through the deadlines, and sometimes... doing the moonwalk because your cab really was late. 😎 132 13 Comments Like Comment Share Neuphony™ reposted this Ria Rustagi 9mo Report this post “In Mumbai, our headphones put CEOs to sleep (literally).” . . We personally visited people at their homes when we started demo booking in Mumbai and gave them a 20-minute boost session. Every single one of them dozed off within the time limit. The first question they asked when waking up? “Were we snoring or what?” They were amazed that something like this even existed. Some even admitted they booked the session out of boredom, but still ended up buying our headphones. One participant even denied he had fallen asleep… until his own employees pulled out a video of him dozing off on a chair mid-session. The look on his face? Priceless. And here’s the fun twi

Simform is a premier digital engineering company specializing in Product Engineering, Cloud, Data, Agentic AI, and Enterprise JSON-LD:  Simform is a premier digital engineering company specializing in Product Engineering, Cloud, Data, Agentic AI, and Enterprise Platform Innovation. We help enterprises and high-growth ISVs build digital experiences and scalable, enterprise-grade products what work at scale.
With deep engineering DNA and a unique co-engineering delivery model, Simform partners with technology and business teams to build future-ready digital products. As an Azure Expert MSP, a distinction held by fewer than 105 companies among 400,000+ Microsoft partners and a Microsoft solution partner, we bring deep expertize across Microsoft's cloud and AI ecosystem.
 We deliver outcomes faster through 15+ solution accelerators and dozens of reusable tools and frameworks built to reduce delivery risk and speed up execution. 
Simform is also recognized by analyst firms, including ISG and Everest Group, across comparative vendor studies for its distinguished engineering practices, IP-led approach, and proven track record of delivering enterprise-grade solutions.

Kingsmen Digital Ventures is a next-generation development partner. Bringing the best technical talent, cutting-edge technology, and extraordinary product JSON-LD:  Kingsmen Digital Ventures is a next-generation development partner. Bringing the best technical talent, cutting-edge technology, and extraordinary product management to all custom software initiatives. Our goal is not just to meet success metrics but to drive real business results that align with your objectives.
Our comprehensive suite of services, include:

Product design and engineering
Mobile and web application development
Cloud-based solutions
Enterprise application integration

Closeloop Technologies — AI-Powered Custom Software, Business Automation & Data Solutions | California
Tired of slow software, siloed data, or manual JSON-LD:  Closeloop Technologies — AI-Powered Custom Software, Business Automation & Data Solutions | California
Tired of slow software, siloed data, or manual processes eating into your margins? Closeloop Technologies builds AI-powered digital solutions that help businesses cut costs, move faster, and scale smarter. Trusted by growth-stage and enterprise clients since 2011, our founders are from Oracle, Apple, Google, Meta, LinkedIn, and VMware. We provide top quality talent without the big-tech price tag.
⭐ Inc. 5000 fastest-growing company in its segment | 99.9% client satisfaction score | 15+ years delivering complex software | Strong base of repeat clients who trust us with their most critical systems
We don't just write code — every engineer on your project uses AI to build faster, catch bugs earlier, and maximize your ROI from day one. That means fewer delays, lower costs, and stronger ROI from day one. It's why our clients keep coming back.
What we build:

AI Transformation & Automation: Business process automation, CRM/ERP (Salesforce, NetSuite), legacy systems modernization, systems integration, third-party API integrations
Custom Software & SaaS Development: Full product lifecycle, from wireframing and prototyping to scalable, production-ready platforms
Data Engineering & Analytics: ETL/ELT pipelines, Databricks, Snowflake, data warehousing, data governance, BI dashboards
Mobile & Web App Development: Native iOS/Android, Flutter, React Native, PWAs, Bluetooth-enabled apps, API-first architecture
Cloud Engineering & DevOps: Cloud migration, cloud-native builds, optimization, and robust DevOps pipelines
Next-Gen Technology: Generative AI integrations, Internet of Things (IoT), Blockchain, Platform Engineering

description.value:
Designli helps non-technical founders turn software into real, revenue-generating businesses. 
Most agencies hand over code and walk away, leaving you JSON-LD:  Designli helps non-technical founders turn software into real, revenue-generating businesses. 
Most agencies hand over code and walk away, leaving you to build the business yourself. We work differently, measuring our success by your traction - real users on a live product and real signs that the business is growing. 
Every engagement is built around a guaranteed outcome: 

For founders starting from scratch, our TractionLab program puts a real user on a working Version 1 within 30 days, or your next month is free. From there, the whole team works to turn that first user into many, and early usage into real revenue.
For founders who already have something live, we start with an one-week Impact Week that pinpoints exactly what's holding your product back. You walk away with a customized plan and a guaranteed Day-30 outcome that clears those roadblocks, so you can get back to chasing traction and your vision instead of fighting your product.  

The burden is on us to prove we're the right partner. Picking a software development agency is one of the most important decisions you'll make as a founder, and we don't think that risk should fall entirely on you. That's why your first 14 days are fully refundable, and you can cancel any time with 30 days' notice.
We work using Hypothesis-Driven Development. Building software is cheaper than ever with AI-empowered engineers; the hard part is knowing what to build and whether it worked. So every change we make carries a business metric and a clear bet about what it should move, and we measure whether it actually did. The result is a real feedback loop on whether your product is getting better each week and driving more usage and revenue.
Each engagement is staffed with a small, senior pod that gives your product full-time focus and founder-level care, and is paid on outcomes, not promises. Learn more at https://designli.co Read more Designli Services offered by Designli Mobile App Development Custom Software Development AI Development UX/UI Design Awarded to providers who meet Clutch's highest verification standards — including a minimum 3.0 star rating, at least 3 verified Clutch reviews, and a very low to moderate Creditsafe credit risk rating — confirming they are established, vetted, and reputable businesses.
