description.value: PhoneCurry, we are proud to say, was arguably India’s most loved phone recommendation platform. We helped you decide which phone to buy, in less than 5 minutes. And over the years, we helped over 10 million Indians pick the right phone! Now it's time to say goodbye!

sections.homepage: The PhoneCurry project has ended. A heartfelt message from our Founder, Sahil, follows. Dear PhoneCurry User, On 24 Feb, 2021, we shut down PhoneCurry. All of you have been family for me, and I have personally interacted with many of you over the last 10 years, so you deserve an explanation. WHY WE ARE GOING AWAY, AND A NOTE ON 'QUALITY' PhoneCurry, for me, was always a meditation on that intangible thing called quality. Maintaining quality and providing a great end-to-end user experience takes a lot. You have to really really care about the end-user. You have to be obsessed with what's good for them. You have to let the user's problems consume you. It's quite a journey, but when you do all of that, you create beautiful things. Things that impact people's lives. Things that add to their well-being. Things that make a difference. Building a good product is like being a duck. You have to do a lot of hard work behind the scenes, so that in the end you can offer something simple, seamless, and 'it just works' to your end-user However, in the last year, a few things changed. Much of the core team, including me, moved on to other projects, and maintaining quality has since become a challenge. A few recent audits that I carried out made this amply clear - we were no longer being able to fully live up to the promise of 'being your final destination to decide which phone to buy' - the cracks were beginning to show - and like they say in sports (or more generally in life), you have to know when to retire gracefully. I have therefore come to the conclusion that PhoneCurry has outlived its usefulness, and must now quietly fade into the sunset. Thank you for all the love and support over the last 10 years - it's been a beautiful journey that I will always cherish, not only for all that it taught me, but for the countless relationships I formed with many of you. STAYING IN TOUCH Which brings me to my last point: it would be a privilege for me to stay in touch. There are 2 ways you should be able to remain connected to me: In the foreseeable future, I have no plans of retiring my PhoneCurry email address: [email protected], so you can write to me there: I will be reading all the mails I receive there, and where possible replying too. The best way to remain connected with me on social media, would be on Linkedin. If you send a connection request there, please add a note mentioning that you were a (former) PhoneCurry user. THAT's ALL FOLKS! So that's it folks, it's me and the rest of the team signing off. In the end, if you have some dreams in life that you are working towards, here's a virtual high-five from me - and let me leave you with a quote that has always inspired me All men dream: but not equally. Those who dream in the dark recesses of the night awake in the day to find all was vanity. But the dreamers of day are dangerous men, for they may act their dreams with open eyes, and make it possible. Here's to your dreams, and to making them real :) Yours,Sahil PhoneCurry, 2010-2021

Globe Data Accuracy 99% Accurate Data, Consistently Delivered ✦ Your Trusted AI-Powered Technology Partner Delivering Digital Excellence Since 2013 Saivion India is a trusted ITeS company providing AI-powered solutions, eCommerce services, digital marketing, and digital transformation solutions from its headquarters in New Delhi, India. Since 2013, we have partnered with businesses worldwide, delivering scalable, technology-driven, and cost-effective services through a team of 50+ experienced professionals. Over the past 13+ years, we have served 500+ clients across multiple industries, successfully completing 3,000+ projects spanning AI-powered solutions, eCommerce marketplace management, digital marketing, content creation, photo editing, web development, and digital operations support. Driven by innovation, AI adoption, process optimization, and measurable business outcomes, we help startups, SMBs, and enterprise organizations accelerate growth, improve efficiency, and scale their digital presence in an increasingly competitive marketplace. Trusted by Global Enterprises 95% of our clients return for repeat business, reflecting our commitment to quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction. By combining skilled human expertise with AI-powered technologies and streamlined workflows, we help businesses reduce operational costs by up to 60% while improving efficiency, accuracy, and turnaround times. Get In Touch → Outsourced Operations Outsourced Operations for eCommerce & Digital Businesses Our AI-driven ITeS E-commerce and Digital solutions are aligned to become a seamless extension to business operations through our comprehensive and competitive ITeS services. As a premier technology-driven service provider our skilled and experienced team is capable of managing small to large-scale back-office processes that include data processing, automation support, AI-powered analytics, and digital transformation tasks. E-commerce Entry We provide e-commerce product data entry, with our aim to maintain our process efficiency Data Entry We are the master in the domain of the data entry handling with utmost accuracy and privacy Photo Editing Transform ordinary images into stunning visuals with our expert, affordable, and fast photo editing services. Graphic Design Creative graphic design services that build strong brand identities and captivating visuals for every platform. Web & Development We design and develop responsive, SEO-friendly websites that drive traffic, engagement, and conversions effectively. Digital Marketing We boost your online visibility through SEO, PPC, social media, and strategic content marketing. Marketplace Listing Boost your online store performance with optimized listings for Amazon, eBay, Walmart, and Etsy. Catalog Management Professional catalog management ensuring accurate product data, pricing, and descriptions across multiple marketplaces. We combine design thinking with engineering discipline to deliver scalable, cloud-ready solutions for startups and enterprises across India and beyond. We follow agile practices, transparent communication and measurable milestones — with production-quality apps, secure backends, admin dashboards and analytics built to help you grow faster. Agile Development Cloud-Native NDA Protected ISO Standards 180-Day Support 200+Projects Successfully Delivered 72+5-Star Google Reviews 5+Years of Industry Excellence Trusted by 100+ startups and enterprises across retail, healthcare, fintech & travel industries. 🏆 Top App DevCompany Delhi What We Do Our Core Services End-to-end digital solutions engineered with a product-first mindset. 📱 Mobile App Development Custom Android, iOS and cross-platform apps with beautiful UI, secure backends and App Store-ready code. ANDROID · iOS · CROSS-PLATFORM 💻 Website Development High-speed, SEO-optimised, responsive websites and web apps for businesses of all sizes. REACT · ANGULAR · NODE.JS 🦋 Flutter App Development Single codebase Flutter apps for Android, iOS and web with pixel-perfect UI and 60fps performance. FLUTTER · DART ⚛️ React Native Development Scalable, maintainable React Native apps for iOS and Android with shared components and native modules. REACT NATIVE · JS · TS 🤖 AI & ML Solutions Chatbots, recommendation engines, predictive analytics and smart automation powered by AI and ML. AI · ML · NLP · LLM 🛒 eCommerce Solutions End-to-end eCommerce stores and mobile apps with cart, payments, inventory and logistics integrations. SHOPIFY · CUSTOM · WCAG 🏥 Healthcare & Telemedicine HIPAA-ready patient portals, appointment booking systems and secure medical record storage apps. TELEMEDICINE · EHR · HL7 💳 Fintech & Payments Secure fintech apps with wallet systems, KYC workflows, payment gateways and compliance-ready architecture. RAZORPAY · STRIPE · PAYU 🎨 UI/UX Design User-centric wireframes, prototypes and high-fidelity designs that convert visitors into loyal customers. FIGMA · DESIGN SYSTEMS ☁️ Cloud & DevOps AWS, Azure and GCP deployments with CI/CD pipelines, containerisation and 99.9% uptime SLAs. AWS · AZURE · DOCKER · K8S How We Work Our Development Process A transparent, milestone-driven workflow from idea to App Store. 01Requirement DiscoveryWe deep-dive into your business goals, user journeys and technical needs to define a clear scope, KPIs and product roadmap before a single line of code is written. 02Design & PrototypingUser flows, wireframes and high-fidelity UI prototypes are crafted with a laser focus on usability, brand consistency and conversion optimisation. 03Agile DevelopmentOur engineers build secure, scalable apps using Flutter, React Native, Node.js, Kotlin, Swift and more — with weekly sprints and live build previews. 04Quality AssuranceRigorous functional, performance, security and usability testing across real devices ensures a rock-solid, production-ready product. 05Launch & DeploymentWe deploy to Google Play, App Store or cloud servers with optimised build configurations, code signing and App Store Optimisation. 06Support & Growth180 days of post-launch support including monitoring, OS updates, performance tuning and feature expansion based on real user feedback. Why Invest The ROI of Intelligent Software AI-powered and well-engineered digital products deliver measurable business outcomes from day one. 30% Cut Operational Costs Eliminate manual workflows with intelligent automation. Our clients consistently reduce operational overhead by up to 30% within the first 6 months of deployment. 25% Increase Customer LTV Deliver smarter, data-driven user experiences with AI-powered personalisation, helping businesses grow customer lifetime value significantly. 50% Faster Innovation Cycles Accelerate R&D and market testing with generative AI tooling, cutting the time from idea to production-ready feature by up to half. Industry Reach Industries We Serve Domain experience across 16+ verticals — from fintech and healthcare to travel and education. Statistics Statistics The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you. Marketing Marketing The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes. Over the past several years, we have been the best website development company in Delhi. We take pride that if you search for the Top 5 website development companies in Delhi, you will find our name, "Appfinz Technologies", featured everywhere. When our journey started in 2015, we began with only three people, and now we have 25+ in-house experts and 50+ freelancer website developers in Delhi working with us. We have successfully delivered high-quality website designing and digital marketing services to more than 150+ clients worldwide. We always prefer perfect outcomes that value our associates. Our primary focus is to provide the most effective, user-friendly, and eye-catching website development solutions. We focus on driving results to customers that help them get better ROI. Our in-house website development team are always looking to innovate and deliver result-driven, cutting-edge solutions that fulfill your website and business expectations. At Appfinz Technologies (the Best Website Development Company in Delhi), we strongly believe in creative and effective methods to create engaging website development solutions that are responsive, multi-functional and optimized for better performance. Whether you need school/institute website development, corporate website designing, or Shopify ecommerce websites, we will customize and arrange our resources to suit your website-related needs. We proudly say that we are India's only reliable website development company that offers website design, website development, web portals, digital marketing services, SEO services, Facebook & Instagram Paid Outreach, and Email Outreach under one roof. Our dedicated approach has helped us become the preferred choice for startups, small businesses, and enterprises like yours. ₹ We've generated over 60 Million+ client revenue in INR We're a CERTIFIED Shopify & Wordpress partner ⇱ We've generated 60,000+ leads for our clients ☺ We've made 120+ clients worldwide We're a CERTIFIED Google Ads partner Why Choose Appfinz Technologies for Website Development? Appfinz Technologies, the best website development company in delhi, is known for its innovative and custom website layouts that give our clients a competitive edge. Our team of highly professional and skilled specialists, including website developers, PHP web developers, Shopify website developers, WordPress developers, and business-savvy individuals, are well-versed in the most current innovations. With a decade of experience, we have consistently delivered top-quality website development solutions. As India's leading Top 5 Website Development Company in Delhi, we have created thousands of interactive features for our clients, showcasing our extensive experience and expertise in the field. With our experience in various fields, we understand the market and its needs. In accordance to digital marketing, we also understand the Google parameters and Facebook algorithms better. We will create your Digital Identity Online With our dedication and expertise, we commit to transforming your business into the next phase of success. Our website development team is highly skilled in every aspect of website development, website design, e-commerce website development, Facebook Outreach, Guest Posting, Technical SEO, Payment Gateway Integrations, Shopify Website SEO, Website Debugging, New features development, and all other digital marketing and website needs. Our Web development services ensure that all your digital needs are met under one roof. If you are looking for the best website development company in Delhi, you have landed at the right place. It takes a lot of time for startups to set up in the world market. Today, without an online presence, it isn't easy to succeed easily in this era of digitization. That's why we aim to deliver success for your startups with our valued services. Important Elements of a High-Quality Website With years of industry experience, we understand what it takes to build a high-performing website that attracts traffic and drives growth. At our website design company in Delhi, we craft tailored, results-driven websites that help businesses scale. Below are the key elements we focus on to ensure every website delivers maximum impact: Easy Navigation Quality Content Visual Design User-Focused SEO Optimized Easy Navigation Website navigation is a crucial aspect often peoples underestimate it. A user-friendly website is the key to customer satisfaction, while a convoluted one with numerous pages can lead to website visitor frustration. That's why we make it a point to use breadcrumbs on our websites! For instance, you can easily navigate to Home>Services>Products. This simple feature relieves users from the complexity of navigation, making their browsing experience more straightforward and enjoyable. Quality Website Content Content is the backbone of a high-quality website. We focus on delivering relevant, valuable, and engaging content that connects with your audience and improves SEO performance. Visual Design A visually appealing website creates a strong first impression. We combine aesthetics with functionality to build designs that are modern, responsive, and aligned with your brand identity. User-Focused Understanding your users is key. We craft websites that meet the specific needs and expectations of your target audience, making sure the experience is smooth, valuable, and delightful. SEO Optimized At the time of development and coding, we work in collaboration with other marketing plans and implement marketing strategies like search engine optimization and social media optimization, to help you gain more traffic and appear higher in the search rankings. CERTIFICATIONS THAT PROVE OUR CREDIBILITY Over the 9 years we have worked hard to perform exceptionally better to satisfy our clients and these recognition attach as extra star of excellence to our golden journey of success. Website Development Services in Delhi, Noida & Gurgaon Appfinz Technologies is one of the most affordable website development companies in Delhi, with over 10 years of industry experience. We have built an impressive portfolio of website development and digital marketing projects, showcasing our work across diverse industries such as EdTech, Apparel, Automotive, E-Commerce, Food & Beverages, and more. Our team comprises skilled web developers, creative designers, and result-driven digital marketing experts. We focus on delivering personalized, responsive, and high-performing websites that help your brand achieve its online goals and stand out in the digital space. Custom Website Designing & Development At Appfinz Technologies, we believe in a client-centric approach. Our professional web developers are committed to building custom website designs and providing development services that align with our client's vision. We value our client’s opinions and ideas, ensuring that the website we create is a true reflection of their brand’s values and meets all criteria. description.value:
Empat delivers full-cycle software development grounded in research, empathy, and technical excellence — from system architecture and engineering to UI/UX JSON-LD:  Empat delivers full-cycle software development grounded in research, empathy, and technical excellence — from system architecture and engineering to UI/UX and go-to-market. Since 2013, we've delivered 300+ digital products across 17 countries, empowering brands like Porsche, Panasonic, Transparency International, Heinemann, CBRE, and dozens of ambitious startups and scaleups. 🔧 What we build:

Mobile applications (iOS, Android, cross-platform: Flutter, React Native)
Web applications (React, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript, Next.js)
AI Development
CRM & ERP systems 
SaaS platforms
Custom dashboards & analytics tools
E-commerce solutions 
Marketplaces

 🧠 Our expertise

FinTech – Digital wallets, lending platforms, payment integrations, KYC/AML workflows, personal finance tools.
HealthTech – HIPAA-compliant apps, patient portals, EHR systems, mental health apps, IoT integrations.

Additional experience in:

EdTech
PropTech
Retail & E-commerce

💻 Tech stack

Frontend: React, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript, HTML/CSS, WebSockets
Mobile: Flutter, React Native, Kotlin, Swift, SwiftUI
Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Python (Django, FastAPI), Ruby on Rails, Go, PHP (Laravel), Java (Spring)
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, ClickHouse
DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, GitLab CI/CD, Terraform
QA: Cypress, Jest, Playwright, Postman, Selenium
Design & Prototyping: Figma, Adobe XD, Zeplin
Analytics & Monitoring: Sentry, Mixpanel, Google Analytics

🤝 Why Empat?
✅ 10+ years of software development experience
✅ 300+ projects delivered
✅ 140+ in-house experts
✅ Trusted by Porsche, Panasonic, and global NGOs
✅ Deep expertise in FinTech & HealthTech
✅ Transparent communication & agile delivery
✅ Flexible engagement models: fixed price, dedicated teams, time & material
Let’s build something powerful together — and make it user-loved, future-ready, and truly impactful.
📬 Contact us: hello@empat.tech

description.value:
Empat delivers full-cycle software development grounded in research, empathy, and technical excellence — from system architecture and engineering to UI/UX JSON-LD:  Empat delivers full-cycle software development grounded in research, empathy, and technical excellence — from system architecture and engineering to UI/UX and go-to-market. Since 2013, we've delivered 300+ digital products across 17 countries, empowering brands like Porsche, Panasonic, Transparency International, Heinemann, CBRE, and dozens of ambitious startups and scaleups. 🔧 What we build:

Mobile applications (iOS, Android, cross-platform: Flutter, React Native)
Web applications (React, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript, Next.js)
AI Development
CRM & ERP systems 
SaaS platforms
Custom dashboards & analytics tools
E-commerce solutions 
Marketplaces

 🧠 Our expertise

FinTech – Digital wallets, lending platforms, payment integrations, KYC/AML workflows, personal finance tools.
HealthTech – HIPAA-compliant apps, patient portals, EHR systems, mental health apps, IoT integrations.

Additional experience in:

EdTech
PropTech
Retail & E-commerce

💻 Tech stack

Frontend: React, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript, HTML/CSS, WebSockets
Mobile: Flutter, React Native, Kotlin, Swift, SwiftUI
Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Python (Django, FastAPI), Ruby on Rails, Go, PHP (Laravel), Java (Spring)
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, ClickHouse
DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, GitLab CI/CD, Terraform
QA: Cypress, Jest, Playwright, Postman, Selenium
Design & Prototyping: Figma, Adobe XD, Zeplin
Analytics & Monitoring: Sentry, Mixpanel, Google Analytics

🤝 Why Empat?
✅ 10+ years of software development experience
✅ 300+ projects delivered
✅ 140+ in-house experts
✅ Trusted by Porsche, Panasonic, and global NGOs
✅ Deep expertise in FinTech & HealthTech
✅ Transparent communication & agile delivery
✅ Flexible engagement models: fixed price, dedicated teams, time & material
Let’s build something powerful together — and make it user-loved, future-ready, and truly impactful.

As a software development company with 20+ years in the field, Vention provides innovative services to startups and large enterprises. The company tackle JSON-LD:  As a software development company with 20+ years in the field, Vention provides innovative services to startups and large enterprises. The company tackle projects of any complexity and size, delivering outstanding solutions that help clients focus on business expansion and new opportunities.
With 3K+ dedicated developers globally, Vention match clients with top engineering talent in time zones that align seamlessly with their unique needs.
The company’s impressive track record:

Over 500 industry-leading clients, including PayPal, IBM, Mount Sinai, PwC, and Postman.
Contributions to client acquisitions exceeding $15B.
Clients typically save up to $600K annually.
An average client relationship of more than 36 months, demonstrating consistently high client satisfaction.
The longest client engagement has lasted 16 years.

Vention provides end-to-end software development expertise, covering the full engineering spectrum—from initial concept creation to final delivery and optimization:

Custom software development
AI software development
Web and mobile development
QA and testing
Cloud & DevOps
Blockchain
AR/VR

AppIt Ventures 
We're an award-winning, woman-owned and led, custom software development company.
Since our inception in 2012, AppIt has delivered JSON-LD:  AppIt Ventures 
We're an award-winning, woman-owned and led, custom software development company.
Since our inception in 2012, AppIt has delivered hundreds of exceptional-quality applications and custom-made software solutions for satisfied clients, from local small-and-medium businesses to Fortune 500 companies. Our reputation for developing world-class mobile and web-based applications that expand customer bases and bottom lines has steadily grown throughout this time.
Industries We Primarily Work With
Our team will guide you through each stage of the software development process with a transparent and consultative approach. We specialize in app development in the following industries:

Healthcare, Health & Wellness
Business Services

Nonprofit and Government
Education

Web Application Development

description.value:
Most outsourcing partners give you code — while keeping you dependent. You get the features today, but tomorrow you inherit technical debt, rising JSON-LD:  Most outsourcing partners give you code — while keeping you dependent. You get the features today, but tomorrow you inherit technical debt, rising maintenance pressure, knowledge gaps, and a frustrated product team.
We at MetaProject designed our delivery workflow to mitigate that from the start, focusing on the capability-building partnership instead of a backlog management. Our team embed alongside your product pod to build and deliver the scope while transferring the operating system and best practices behind it: codified delivery standards, playbooks, processes, automated pipelines, and decision trees that your engineers need to maintain and develop the product independently.
Every sprint delivers two things: software and capability.
Our model is built for organisations that want to escape vendor lock-in, facilitate Product-focused delivery, scale predictably and maintain full control over their products. 
What we specialise in:


Legacy modernisation, replatforming and Cloud adoption


Microservices and distributed systems architecture


High-load, high-availability systems engineering


Secure software supply chain (DevSecOps)


Strategic Delivery model & capability expansion


Centres of Excellence - design and implementation


Our philosophy is simple: build your long-term capability, not another dependency.We coach, mentor, codify, and transfer everything we build, so your team can scale confidently with full architectural context and zero black boxes. Then we exit — by design.
If you want to increase delivery velocity, optimize your OpEx structure, reduce reliance on vendors, and empower your own team to ship at a world-class level — let’s talk!Read more MetaProject Services offered by MetaProject Custom Software Development Mobile App Development Web Development UX/UI Design Awarded to providers who meet Clutch's highest verification standards — including a minimum 3.0 star rating, at least 3 verified Clutch reviews, and a very low to moderate Creditsafe credit risk rating — confirming they are established, vetted, and reputable businesses. With 400+ experts across the US, Europe, Latin America, Canada, JSON-LD:  Sombra is a global AI-first software development and AI consulting partner. With 400+ experts across the US, Europe, Latin America, Canada, India, and the Middle East, we design, build, and deliver IT solutions in AI, financial services, healthcare, e-commerce, energy, logistics, and telecommunications.

We help you recruit, hire, manage and scale world-class offshore distributed Software Teams. We also design and develop full-cycle custom projects.
Hire JSON-LD:  We help you recruit, hire, manage and scale world-class offshore distributed Software Teams. We also design and develop full-cycle custom projects.
Hire globally distributed teams
Access critically needed resources. Maintain full operational control.
Rethink your talent strategy to incorporate vetted and tested quality software developers in the Philippines. Your new team will be ready to add immediate value as an extension of your local team managed directly by your company with our assistance. Have full control over selecting the employees, setting their work hours, and integrating them into your company's culture.
Partner with our Managed Services for Full-Cycle Digital Product Development
Just focus on your business, and let us drive the development of your software! We can build a product leadership and a development team for you. Our teams build and maintain enterprise web software and iOS/Android apps that scale with your business.

Only 3% turnover for 5+ years

With our consulting mindset and domain expertise in insurance, JSON-LD:  We are a tech strategy advisor and tech delivery partner with 25+ years of experience. With our consulting mindset and domain expertise in insurance, finance, media, energy & utilities, we are obsessed with transforming your business ambitions into measurable results. We proceed according to unique, AI-enabled advisory & delivery framework grounded in technological heritage, AI roots and continuously optimised to deliver faster.
We design our solutions on the basis of clients’ technology foundations and data infrastructure with high quality, governance and compliance standards to scale safely. We can modernise even complex, legacy systems and operate in regulated industries.
Our competences and value-added services are tailored to solve clients' key business challenges. 

AI & Automation - Transform into an AI-boosted business. Discover how our services will cut costs, improve productivity, test your ideas, and maximise ROI.
Data Science & Engineering - Enrich your data-driven operations, unlock insights, and drive efficiency with modern data science and engineering solutions.
Infrastructure & Security - Design and manage resilient infrastructure while strengthening your security posture, including support for regulatory requirements.

We assist clients with AI & ML, Cloud, Consulting, Cybersecurity, Data Solutions, Digital Product, and Software Development.

description.value:
We’re Olearis, a mobile and web development studio founded in 2013. We help startups and growing companies design, build, launch, and scale mobile apps, JSON-LD:  We’re Olearis, a mobile and web development studio founded in 2013. We help startups and growing companies design, build, launch, and scale mobile apps, SaaS platforms, AI products, and custom web solutions.
Our strongest areas are Flutter app development, iOS and Android app development, AI mobile app development, healthcare and wellness apps, social apps, education platforms, marketplaces, IoT products, and B2B SaaS.
We’re a good fit if you need more than just coding. Our team supports product strategy, UX/UI design, mobile development, backend development, API integrations, QA, launch, and post-launch growth.
🔥 Selected results:400+ digital products built since 2013Parlor — audio social app with 10M+ downloadsGoFrendly — social networking app with 450K+ users and $2.88M+ raisedUpLife — mental health app with 500K+ users and 4.6★ App Store ratingMila Cares — mobile, backend, and API work, including optimization from 10 GB to 30 MB memory usage
What we build:Flutter mobile apps for iOS and AndroidAI-powered mobile apps and SaaS platformsHealthcare, mental health, wellness, and education appsSocial networking and community appsMarketplaces and productivity toolsIoT apps and connected device platformsAdmin panels, dashboards, and custom web platforms
Tech stack: Flutter, React Native, Swift, SwiftUI, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Django, Firebase, AWS, and GCP.
How we work: we keep scope, budget, and priorities clear from the beginning. Clients get regular updates, transparent task tracking, clear milestones, and direct communication with the team.
We can work as a fixed-price partner, time-and-materials team, or dedicated development team.
If you’re planning a mobile app, AI product, SaaS platform, or MVP, we can help shape the idea, build the first version, launch it, and improve it after release.Read more Olearis Services offered by Olearis Mobile App Development UX/UI Design Custom Software Development Web Development Awarded to providers who meet Clutch's highest verification standards — including a minimum 3.0 star rating, at least 3 verified Clutch reviews, and a very low to moderate Creditsafe credit risk rating — confirming they are established, vetted, and reputable businesses. What we JSON-LD:  Since 2013, Rubyroid Labs helps US and global companies scale, modernize, and stabilize web and mobile products while keeping delivery on track.

Ruby on Rails Development: Take over existing codebases, upgrade unsupported Rails versions, and reduce tech debt - using phased rollouts so your team keeps shipping features throughout.


React Native Mobile Apps: New apps and native-to-React Native migrations that lower long-term maintenance costs.


Product Design (UI/UX): Research-driven redesigns for live products - improving onboarding, navigation, and conversion flows based on user behavior, not guesswork.


AI & Workflow Automation: Practical AI integrations - LLM assistants and workflow automation embedded into your existing product, deployed in your cloud infrastructure with your data staying private.

Backend, mobile, and design on one team. When the API changes, the app and UI move together - you're not coordinating three separate vendors.

Pricing Pricing Work With Us Career [email protected] Fill the form Projects Blog Contact us Contact us 5.0 on Clutch 30+ verified reviews 50+ senior engineers 2015 founded Senior Python & AI Engineers On Demand - Staff Augmentation by Uvik Software Uvik Software is an engineer-led staff augmentation company founded in 2015 and headquartered in Tallinn, Estonia, with a UK commercial office in Ipswich. We embed senior Python, AI, data, and platform engineers into product teams across the US, UK, and Europe. Vetted profiles arrive within 48 hours, and engineers can be embedded in two weeks. Talk to an expert 48h from SOW to matched profiles 2 weeks to engineer embedded in your team 7+ years seniority floor, no juniors 30 days free replacement guarantee Empower Your Business Now With Our Software Development Services Get top-level delivery for your project’s success. Generative AI Consulting Services With our deep expertise in the field, we offer both practical and ethical solutions to your problems. Boost the productivity of your business with the help of new technologies! Get AI consultation now Full-Stack Web Development Hire well-worked together teams of full-stack developers (Python + React/React Native), topped up with experienced project managers. Build great web and mobile products from scratch, hassle-free. Hire Full-Stack Engineers Data Engineering & Data Science Unlock the potential of your data with UVIK's Data Science and AI engineers. We specialize in harnessing the power of advanced analytics, machine learning (ML), and generative artificial intelligence (AI) implementation. Hire Data Engineer AI & Data Consulting (Strategy → Build → Integrate) Are you looking to discuss your data-based ideas with industry experts? We can do that, and then we have skilled engineers in AI for business and machine learning to staff up your teams. Get AI/ML Consultation Dedicated Development Teams Need a turnkey team to jump on your project? No problem. You can get the whole team, including all the required specialists, infrastructure and a dedicated manager for a seamless process. Hire Dedicated Team CTO As a Service Receive the strategic guidance and technical expertise of a Chief Technology Officer without the long-term commitment and high cost of a full-time leadership executive. Inquire About CTO How Staff Augmentation Works? Staff augmentation with UVIK is a streamlined, engineer-led approach built to help you scale delivery quickly. As a software team extension, we integrate senior engineers into your team and workflows to support Python back-end, front-end, data engineering, and data science/AI initiatives—while keeping onboarding, communication, and execution predictable and aligned with your requirements. Send the Requirements Share the role, project context, required skills, start date, and team setup. Sign the NDA Put confidentiality in place before sharing product, codebase, or infrastructure details. Receive the Project Assessment Align on scope, team shape, delivery milestones, and the candidate profile. Review Matched Profiles Receive vetted profiles and interview the engineers who fit the role. Sign the Contract Finalize the MSA, SOW, IP assignment, and any required data-processing terms. Start Onboarding Set up access, agree working hours and sprint cadence, and begin the engineer’s onboarding into your codebase. Pros of Getting Your IT Staff from UVIK Whether you’re a startup or an established company, UVIK adapts to your changing needs as an engineer-led staff augmentation partner, helping you scale delivery while maintaining high quality. 01. Get A-players We only provide professional developers who have been UVIK’s employees for over a year. So they come to you fully vetted, need minimal ramp-up time, and have a track record of delivering swift results. 02. Scale Fast and Easy Our model allows expanding your team with remote developers whenever your project demands, and then reducing it painlessly. Forget about delaying the work due to a lack of skilled staff. 03. Save Up to 60% Paying only for the hours each developer has worked on your app or project allows companies to save up to 60% in comparison to search and hiring new full-time employees. 04. Command Your Project You maintain direct communication with your remote team at all times. Daily code reviews and retrospectives allow you to control each stage of the project. 05. Employ motivated devs We nurture long-term relationships with team members, most of whom have been with us for years. Their loyalty and motivation translate into a commitment to excellence for your projects. 06. Control your budget We accurately estimate the timeframe and avoid budget overruns. You can dial the number of dedicated developers for your project up or down on the go, as required. Following guidelines, they designed the platform and created a tool to enable updates. They provide ongoing maintenance. Imaginary Landscape delivered an intuitive and effective website that receives positive feedback from internal and external users alike. The team provides prompt responses and produces deliverables on time. They are transparent and offer valuable support, which results in ongoing collaboration. A Clutch analyst personally interviewed this client over the phone. Below is an edited transcript. BACKGROUND Introduce your business and what you do there. We’re a nonprofit nurse practitioner foundation called the Nurse Practitioner Healthcare Foundation. We do scholarships, awards, and continuing education for nursing and advanced practice nursing students. While I handle all of the financial components of the grants, I also do a lot of administration work. OPPORTUNITY / CHALLENGE What challenge were you trying to address with Imaginary Landscape? Our organization engaged Imaginary Landscape before I came on board, but I believe the president wanted to completely rebuild our website. SOLUTION What was the scope of their involvement? Imaginary Landscape built our website from scratch using Django. Their team helped us with all aspects of the website including its design. Our president had a vision for the website that Imaginary Landscape implemented. They also provided a platform that allows us to update the website, which we do constantly because there are always new scholarships, award winners, and programs. Their team also coordinates with our team to enable email blasts. Whenever we have a problem, we contact Imaginary Landscape. What is the team composition? I work with Amy (Web Development Project Manager, Imaginary Landscape) and Brian (President and CEO, Imaginary Landscape) frequently. How did you come to work with Imaginary Landscape? Our partnership began quite a few years ago, so I don’t know how the decision was made. What is the status of this engagement? We started working together in 2012, and it’s an ongoing engagement. RESULTS & FEEDBACK What evidence can you share that demonstrates the impact of the engagement? We’ve had feedback from our nursing students who say that the site’s great and easy to use. My colleague comments that uploading new scholarships and awards forms is an easy process. We don’t get bug reports, so the site runs smoothly. How did Imaginary Landscape perform from a project management standpoint? Usually, we communicate via email and get a response quickly. Sometimes, Amy and I have tutorials over the pho

description.value:
We’ve been building with Python and Django since the early days, growing alongside the framework for over 16 years. From helping startups secure funding to JSON-LD:  We’ve been building with Python and Django since the early days, growing alongside the framework for over 16 years. From helping startups secure funding to enabling enterprises to scale with confidence, we develop solutions that are efficient, secure, and built for real business needs—without unnecessary complexity.
While Django is at our core, our expertise extends beyond web development. We create high-performance iOS solutions, covering everything from MVP and PoC development to AI-powered integrations, backend connectivity, performance tuning, and long-term support.
What We've Achieved🚀 130+ projects delivered across multiple industries💰 $1B+ raised by startups using our solutions👨‍💻 100+ in-house Python/Django engineers ready to tackle complex challenges⭐ 92.7% Net Promoter Score (NPS) – a reflection of strong client relationships📊 4.8/5 satisfaction rating on Clutch & GoodFirms, based on real project outcomes🔗 3.5 years average client partnership – we build lasting collaborations
Our AI-driven solutions are designed to automate, optimize, and enhance operations across industries: Fintech, Healthcare, Smart Operations, Intelligent Learning.While we work with businesses worldwide, our key hubs include:🇺🇸 US (24%) | 🇨🇭 Switzerland (14%) | 🇬🇧 UK | 🌍 MENA Region | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇦🇺 Australia | 🇳🇱 Netherlands
Every market has unique regulations, compliance needs, and technical challenges, and we tailor our solutions to meet both business goals and industry standards—not just writing code.
Industries we excel in Fintech, logistics, travel, e-commerce, edTech, propTech, healthcare, sustainability & green tech
Why Work With Django Stars?🏆 Recognized Python & Django experts, featured on Clutch🔒 Certified for quality, security, and sustainability (ISO 9001, 14001, 27001)🛡 Committed to data protection with full GDPR compliance📋 Led by experienced project managers, backed by PMI-certified leadershipRead more Django Stars Services offered by Django Stars Custom Software Development Web Development Awarded to providers who meet Clutch's highest verification standards — including a minimum 3.0 star rating, at least 3 verified Clutch reviews, and a very low to moderate Creditsafe credit risk rating — confirming they are established, vetted, and reputable businesses. Clutch Premier Verified Clutch Awarded to providers with at least 3 verified reviews rated 4.0 or higher in the past 24 months in Custom Software Development, where Custom Software Development represents at least 10% of the provider's service allocation on Clutch. description.value: Find trusted Instinctools reviews & rankings on Goodfirms. Explore the company profile, top-notch services, and client testimonials to evaluate for your next project. description.value:
We design technology that is built to scale. Our proprietary development processes guarantee reliable, user-centered solutions that drive seamless digital JSON-LD:  We design technology that is built to scale. Our proprietary development processes guarantee reliable, user-centered solutions that drive seamless digital transformation for Enterprise and Scale-up companies. That is what we call seamless technology.
We have helped many customers achieve growth such as Nokia, Thermo-Fisher, and BNP Paribas. Over the last 13 years, with more than 300 projects developed, we have gathered several awards such as Financial Times 1000: Europe's Fastest Growing Companie 2023 & 2024, Top 100 Fastest Growing Companies, Top 1000 Global Companies in 2020 & 2021, UK Top B2B Company in 2021 & 2022, and Europe Best Workplace® 2022.
 
Have a new project? Email us at info@imaginarycloud.com
 
 
Our services:

Product Ideation: Scoping Session, Product Development Process, MVP, Digital Transformation
Product Development: Software Development, Web Development, Mobile Development, Artificial Intelligence, UX/UI Design, Quality Assurance
Product Improvement: Code Audit, UX Audit, Digital Acceleration

 
Our tech stack:

Front & Back end: React, Next.JS, Angular, Due, Webflow, Node, Python, Rails, Django
Mobile: React Native, Flutter
Systems: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud

 
Why us?

Built to scale.
Digital acceleration with a lean mindset. 
Human-Centric.
Highly process-oriented.
Technical Excellency. 
Work with the 1%. 
Full transparency. 
Partner & advisor.

Since 2013, we've delivered 300+ digital products across 17 countries, empowering brands like Porsche, Panasonic, Transparency International, Heinemann, CBRE, and dozens of ambitious startups and scaleups. 🔧 What we build: - Mobile applications (iOS, Android, cross-platform: Flutter, React Native) - Web applications (React, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript, Next.js) - CRM & ERP systems - SaaS platforms - Custom dashboards & analytics tools - E-commerce solutions - Marketplaces - B2B & B2C platforms - Internal tools & automation systems - API-first backends & microservices 🧠 Our expertise We specialize in: - FinTech – Digital wallets, lending platforms, payment integrations, KYC/AML workflows, personal finance tools. - HealthTech – HIPAA-compliant apps, patient portals, EHR systems, mental health apps, IoT integrations. Additional experience in: - EdTech - PropTech - Retail & E-commerce - Nonprofits & NGOs - Logistics & Transportation - Travel & Hospitality - Media & Entertainment Why Choose Us 💻 Tech stack Frontend: React, Vue.js, Angular, TypeScript, HTML/CSS, WebSockets Mobile: Flutter, React Native, Kotlin, Swift, SwiftUI Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Python (Django, FastAPI), Ruby on Rails, Go, PHP (Laravel), Java (Spring) Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, ClickHouse DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, GitLab CI/CD, Terraform QA: Cypress, Jest, Playwright, Postman, Selenium Design & Prototyping: Figma, Adobe XD, Zeplin Analytics & Monitoring: Sentry, Mixpanel, Google Analytics, Datadog 🔍 Our development process 1. Release & Deployment — CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, feedback loops 6. description.value: Custom web, mobile & AI development — RAG, chatbots, agentic AI, cloud. 250+ products shipped across 13+ countries. Get a free consultation. JSON-LD:  Unico Connect is an AI-native software development company that designs and builds intelligent digital products for startups, mid-market companies, and enterprises worldwide. Since 2014, Unico Connect has shipped 250+ production software products across 13+ countries from its engineering hub in Mumbai with a US presence. The company combines deep engineering expertise with AI-powered development to ship products that work in production, and holds ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications. With over a decade of engineering leadership across cloud architecture, system design, and DevOps, he founded Unico Connect in January 2014 with a mission to ship software that scales — combining production-grade engineering with modern AI tooling. His work today centers on architecting AI-native systems, embedding agentic AI into product workflows, and helping engineering teams move from prototype to production with predictable cost, reliability, and operational depth. We are focused on crafting custom mobile and web applications for both startups and large enterprises, assisting our awesome clients and partners all the way from concept and design to finished product, launch, and maintenance. Our close-knit team consists of 100+ IT experts including top-skilled UI/UX Designers, professional Software Engineers, QA Engineers, Project Managers, Product Owners, and Business Analysts. We have extensive expertise in FinTech, Healthcare, and Education, as well as in creating functional and large-scale marketplaces, social platforms, engaging mobile applications, and advanced AI algorithms. We are also happy to provide Consulting services on building reference Agile development processes using SAFe frameworks, as well as to ensure Staff Augmentation and empower existing teams with our best talents. Working with customers from all over the world, we promote innovation, push the boundaries of design and use only the latest technologies to charge great ideas with technical excellence and flawless execution. description.value: ValueCoders is a software outsourcing partner providing AI-augmented and human-governed teams for product engineering and modernization. JSON-LD:  ValueCoders ValueCoders Engineering teams that ship production software AI Augmented. Human Governed. We help tech product companies, funded startups, and engineering teams ship software, not just plan it. From MVPs to enterprise systems, we design, build, and maintain software that works, scales, and delivers on time without surprises. Software Engineering Partner for Predictable Delivery Software Engineering Partner for Predictable Delivery Software Engineering Partner for Predictable Delivery ValueCoders Engineering teams that ship production software AI Augmented. Human Governed. We help tech product companies, funded startups, and engineering teams ship software, not just plan it. From MVPs to enterprise systems, we design, build, and maintain software that works, scales, and delivers on time without surprises. Software Engineering Partner for Predictable Delivery Professional Service What kind of companies do you typically work with? How quickly can you start a project or onboard engineers? Only a Few Deliver Outcome. In 20+ years of serving businesses across the globe, we’ve learned the biggest hindrance they face in meeting deadlines. It’s their software outsourcing partners who prioritize their own continuity. They hire when the scope expands. Scale down when the scope softens. We don’t. You Need to Accelerate Your Software Roadmap You have a fixed deadline but you are falling behind your planned schedule. ValueCoders | 18,774 followers on LinkedIn. Engineering Velocity | At 𝗩𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲𝗖𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀, we help technology-driven businesses - from early-stage startups to global enterprises - 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁 𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘆, 𝗺𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗲 𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗰𝘆 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘀𝗰𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺𝘀 without the hiring delays or cost overhead of traditional models.

description.value: We are aiming as IT company where each and every employee embodies “Work and Smile” and creates innovation through the synergy of various cultures & lifestyles and contributes to people in the world and society from Asia with technology.

sections.homepage: HOME ABOUT SERVICE RECRUIT ACCESS CONTACT Scroll ABOUT US PERSOL CROSS TECHNOLOGY VIETNAM We aim to be an IT company where each and every employee embraces our group culture of “Work and Smile.” By Leveraging technology, we create innovative solutions through the synergy of various cultures & lifestyles and contribute to the growth and wellbeing of people & society of the world, all starting from the heart of Asia. PERSOL GROUP PERSOL Group consists of over 150 companies operating within domestic Japan & overseas, including HR service companies focused on temporary staffing, recruiting, and job advertisements, to tech service companies, specializing in IT outsourcing and design development. Presently, at 710 sites worldwide, PERSOL group endeavors to resolve various employment related challenges, in order to realize the Group's vision of "Creating a social infrastructure for people and organizations that catalyzes growth and innovation." OUR SERVICE OUR COMMITMENT Point 01 Pursuit Of Advanced Expertise We focus on recruiting and training for every field expertise, such as developers specialized Front End and/or AI/IoT, testers for Quality Control team, UX/UI designers, and more. Point 02 Fluent Development Process Using CI/CD, we have automated a series of development processes, from development environment creation, actual developing, code quality check, testing, to deployment. Point 03 Flexible and Holistic Style We have adopted scrum style development in many projects. We have realized early release and flexible response through quick feedback process. Members who hold CSM/CSPO certificates and high English/Japanese skills communicate with team members and customers smoothly, providing a sophisticated Scrum team. Front end Development of SPA based on iOS/Android applications, and modern JS framework such as React/Vue.js. We engage in high-speed development utilizing our own hybrid application framework. UX / UI Starting from the planning stage, we study and create UI/UX together with the customer. Utilizing prototyping tools such as Adobe XD and InVision, we create and provide high-value applications with excellent design and usability. Testing Experienced senior testers work closely with the development team, in order to perform high quality verification. In addition to functional testing, we respond to a wide range of requests, including specific fields such as security tests, performance tests, and E2E test automation solutions, all at top-notch level. Scrum Our product development team members receive full support in order to obtain CSM/CSPO licenses. Our team continuously contributes to the advancement of the product, through active feedback and improvement. AI / IoT Together with our headquarters in Japan, we conduct joint research and development on cloud-based machine learning technology. This allows members to develop high-level technology and gain knowledge in AI/IoT fields. In addition to its appliance in application development, we carry out AI verification and modeling. Cloud Environment Combining cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, and GCP, we create an optimal system for software products. We are able to provide a vast range of solutions, from common system architecture, to automation which includes template design. RECRUIT WE ARE HIRING! We value the growth of our employees and their time both in and out of the office, aiming to create a company environment where each and every employee feels that they want to continue working. We are looking for talented people to realize "Work and Smile" with us! APPLY NOW 01 Growth opportunities There are various types of job positions, such as front-end, back-end, tester, bridge SE, designer, sales, marketing, customer support, and career paths such as Scrum Master, Project Manager, and Specialist. We also provide valuable training for all job types. In addition, through assessment, we provide promotion opportunities to valuable employees biannually. 02 One team In the company, we designate English as the official language. While understanding and acknowledging each other's differences, diversity of cultures, and ways of thinking, we demonstrate our value as one team. On the other hand, each team is a proactive group with high degree of independence, and each member has a clear awareness of their role. 03 Work-life balance We create and environment where employees are able to reach an equilibrium of their employment position and their private lifestyle. For example, summer holidays and other special holidays are established within the company, a number of in-house systems enables employees to enrich their private life and refresh oneself, and a short-time work program is designated for parents who prioritize childcare. Furthermore, to support employee's health, there are various benefits such as premium health insurance, and sports club support, all to aim for an office full of "Work and Smile"! 04 Communication events There are many opportunities to deepen relationships between co-workers through enjoyable events, such as Halloween and Christmas! Also, at general meeting of members, MVP, VP, and PJT awards are decided by employee voting. All employees value and praise each other for their growth! ACCESS Company name PERSOL CROSS TECHNOLOGY VIETNAM CO., LTD. Founding date Oct 2013 Address 6th Floor, An Phu Plaza, 117-119 Ly Chinh Thang Street, Xuan Hoa Ward, Ho Chi Minh City Tel 028-3848-1200 Founder PERSOL CROSS TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD. CONTACT US Contact us by email or by phone. Head office 6th Floor, An Phu Plaza, 117-119 Ly Chinh Thang Street, Xuan Hoa Ward, Ho Chi Minh City 028-3848-1200 Monday - Friday: 8:30 - 17:30 TAP TO CALL US Accreditations Partnerships HOME ABOUT SERVICE RECRUIT ACCESS CONTACT Privacy Policy ©PERSOL CROSS TECHNOLOGY VIETNAM CO., LTD. All Rights Reserved. × PRIVACY POLICY Concept of personal information Our site will establish the following basic policy. We establish internal rules and compile manuals concerning security management, instruct employees to comply with such rules and manuals, and perform appropriate audits on the status of compliance. We provide employees with training and education on personal information security management. Definition of personal information Our site defines all information that can identify an individual as personal information. Range of use personal information and deletion / correction When collecting personal information, we collect personal information only to the extent necessary. Furthermore, we will only use it within the purpose of use, we will not use it outside purpose. In addition, in the case where the personal information of the viewer changes (for example, address change etc.), or when the viewer wishes to delete the personal information, this site corrects, updates, and updates personal information provided by the viewer. Meanwhile, when the viewer wishes to inquire about personal information, we will confirm that you are the identity and we will correspond. If applicable, please feel free to contact us. Notification of purpose of use If requested by a customer or his/her agent to provide notification of the purpose of use of the personal information, we will provide notification without delay, except in the following cases: When the purpose of using the specified personal information is already clear to the customer; When provision of the notification poses a threat to the life, physical body, property, or other rights and interests of the customer or a third party; When provision of the notification poses a threat to the rights or legal interests of our company; or When we are required to cooperate with national institutions or local authorities in the execution of affairs prescribed by law, and when provision of the notification may constitute a hindrance to the execution of such affairs. Requests Disclosure of Personal Data Personal information you provide will not be provided to third parties unless you consent fro

description.value: ELEKS is a trusted global company that provides full-cycle software engineering outsourcing services, from ideation to finished products. JSON-LD:  ELEKS is a global software engineering and technology consulting company, delivering full-cycle product development, AI, data science, cloud and cybersecurity services since 1991. Software Engineering Artificial Intelligence Data Science Cloud Computing Cybersecurity Digital Transformation Product Design Agile Transformation ELEKS Oleksiy O. Skrypnyk ELEKS Technology Services ELEKS is a trusted global company that provides full-cycle software engineering outsourcing services, from ideation to finished products. ELEKS: Enterprise Software Development, Technology Consulting Home ELEKS is a trusted global organization that provides full-cycle software engineering outsourcing, from ideation to finished products. ELEKS: Enterprise Software Development, Technology Consulting Full-cycle software development services tailored to your unique business vision. Custom Application Development Software Development End-to-end artificial intelligence and machine learning development and consulting. AI Development Services Artificial Intelligence Development Data-driven solutions and advanced analytics to maximise business potential. Data Science Services Data Science Proactive cybersecurity strategy to protect your digital infrastructure. Cyber Security Services Cybersecurity Cloud migration and managed infrastructure services for scalable, resilient operations. Cloud Computing Cloud Computing Strategic product design and UX consulting to create market-leading digital experiences. Product and Service Design Product Design.

Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InSaigon Technology4.953 ReviewsVerifiedVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewsPortfolioVisit websiteAward-winning Vietnam Software Outsourcing CompanySaigon Technology is an ISO-certified global custom software development company in Vietnam established in 2012 with offices across the globe: USA (project management office), Singapore, Australia, Switzerland, USA. As a leading provider of software outsourcing in Vietnam, we offer award-winning custom software development services to startups and enterprises with the strength of 400+ top-tier software engineers and a mature development process. Our  ISO-certified Agile custom software development services: Custom software development Software development outsourcing Offshore development center/fully-integrated development team IT Staff Augmentation Web development Mobile app development Enterprise application development AI/ML Solutions Saigon Technology's unique selling point in software development services is our commitment to delivering high-quality, cost-effective solutions that are tailored to meet the specific needs of their clients. We have a team of highly skilled and experienced developers who are dedicated to staying on top of the latest technologies and best practices in the industry. Additionally, Saigon Technology prides itself on its excellent customer service and communication, ensuring that clients are involved and informed throughout the development process. Our ability to deliver innovative and reliable software solutions sets us apart from our competitors and makes them a valuable partner for businesses looking to enhance their digital capabilities. Our expertise in the application of such technologies as ReactJS, Angular, .NET Core, Java, NodeJS,  Python, AWS, Azure, GCP, AI/ML... All of our software engineers have at least bachelor/engineering degree in IT Engineering and years of practical experience in custom software development, all of them are fluent in English communication. Email us at [email protected] to get free quotes and consultancy. description.value: Goji Labs is a digital product agency building AI products, custom software, mobile apps, and UX/UI design that drive real business outcomes. JSON-LD:  Goji Labs is a digital product agency building AI products, custom software, mobile apps, and UX/UI design that drive real business outcomes. Strategy-Led Digital Product Agency. AI, Software, UX | Goji Labs Home Goji Labs is an expert mobile app development, software development, and website development company based in Los Angeles and New York City. App & Software Development, UI/UX Design | Goji Labs Goji Labs is a digital product agency specializing in AI product development, custom software and mobile app development, UX/UI design, and product strategy. We design and build AI-powered products and digital platforms that drive real business outcomes for startups, scaleups, enterprises, and private equity. Goji Labs.

sections.homepage: Skip to content ServicesAI Product DevelopmentProduct Strategy ConsultingUI/UX DesignApp & Software DevelopmentWorkClientsIndustriesUse CasesCompanyAbout UsBlogCareersGuidesBook a call Get Started A Strategy-First Digital ProductAgency. We help our clients turn complex challenges into intuitive digital products through strategy, UX/UI design, and AI product development. We’ve successfully launched and scaled over 500 platforms to grow revenue and drive customer engagement. Tell Us What You’re Building 500+ Products launched 25M+ Users Supported $1B+ Raised by our clients Our Work See all Work We Designed the World’s First Sports Stock Exchange.A sports investment platform where fans buy and sell virtual shares of athletes, much like a stock market. They set out to transform fandom into financial engagement by allowing users to invest in the performance of their favorite players.Read Case Study3,637%Increase in Avg. Number of Sessions1,305%Number of Deposits Over $100423%Conversions From Signup to Purchase Legal & Regulation Tech The World’s First Cross-Platform Solution for Safely Onboarding Children. $51M Raised in Series A in 9 Months 1,400% Increase in Team Growth Read k-ID Case Study Media & Entertainment Reimagining a Legacy Radio Station's Mobile App for the Next Generation 5,000 Listeners to Monthly Subscribers 60% Increase in App Member Donations Read KCRW Case Study Nonprofit A Nonprofit Working to Save Our Planet’s Species and Habitats. 30% Increase in Donations 26% New Mobile Users Read WWF Case Study Our Services See all Services AI Product DevelopmentWe help organizations turn AI into real products, workflows, and systems that drive measurable outcomes. From defining high-impact opportunities to designing experiences and building scalable solutions, our approach ensures AI is applied with purpose. Every engagement is grounded in strategy, aligned to business goals, and built to perform in real-world conditions.Learn moreApp & Software DevelopmentYou’ve built something that works, now let’s make it something people truly want to use. We develop scalable mobile, web, and custom software products with a clear focus on usability, performance, and long-term growth.Learn moreUI/UX DesignWe turn functionality into intuitive, compelling user experiences. Through research, design systems, and thoughtful interactions, we help you shape products that are not only easy to use, but built to last.Learn moreProduct Strategy ConsultingThe strongest products start with the right plan. Our strategy work helps teams clarify their vision, validate ideas early, and prioritize what will actually move the needle, before investing in full-scale development.Learn more Our Tech Stack From front-end frameworks to cloud infrastructure, our stack is designed to reduce risk, increase confidence, and create products that last. These are the tools we use to move fast, stay reliable, and help our clients launch with impact. github Ruby on Rails Node.js react Next.js iOS Redis Android Figma Rollbar AWS Linear Kubernetes AWS S3 Notion DigitalOcean WordPress What Our Partners Are Saying: “Goji Labs was exactly what we needed. Their team brought clarity, creativity, and momentum to a project that’s central to how we engage our audience. They’ve completely re-energized our digital experience.” Nathalie Hill Chief Audience Officer Learn more about KCRW “They designed and implemented a new on-demand platform that’s far more accessible. Their team was professional, skilled, and responsive, giving us weekly breakdowns of completed work along the way.” Debbie Cravey Development Manager Learn more about Educated Choices Program “My experience with Goji Labs has been nothing but positive. The team is talented, passionate, and truly enjoyable to work with.” Aaron Fleisher Founder Learn more about BYOU “David, Adam, and the entire Goji Labs team are excellent. They combine outstanding technical skills with a tireless work ethic, making them great partners all around.” Kieran Donovan CEO Learn more about k-ID “Goji Labs built a strong mobile app product that’s scheduled for release next month. The team was highly communicative about timelines and even delivered several features ahead of schedule.” Jack Lozyniak Founder Learn more about Gaido “Goji was very professional. I never came to a meeting doubting whether or not they would be prepared for it.” Alex Daley CEO of Hard Assets Alliance Learn more about Hard Assets Alliance “I engaged Goji Labs to design and build our fitness motivation app from scratch—user stories, feature set, and interface included. They delivered a functioning, bug-free app and stayed punctual, communicative, and on budget.” Jack Merino Founder Learn more about Fitness Pact “Since launch, I’ve seen engagement up 6%, page views up 25%, and total users up 5%. They were consistently on time, communicative, and easy to work with. I was genuinely impressed by their professionalism, expertise, and creative, forward-thinking design.” Natasha Wilson Digital Marketing Manager Learn more about TGS “The Goji Labs team was competent, collaborative, and honest. They used Google Hangouts and Docs to keep us updated, and when they didn’t have an immediate answer, they worked quickly to find solutions and communicate them clearly.” Ric Arthur CEO Learn more about Wayfarer “Working with David and his team was a great experience. They were sharp, efficient, and able to adapt quickly to meet our needs.” Brian Lovera Co-founder & CTO Learn more about Kabata “We partnered with Goji Labs for a complete app build, and they delivered. Their team handled the project professionally, and I’d highly recommend them.” Michael Krone Founder Learn more about ADAK Awards& Recognitions Let’s Talk Book a Call ServicesAI Product DevelopmentProduct Strategy ConsultingUI/UX DesignApp & Software DevelopmentClientsCase StudiesIndustriesUse CasesCompanyAbout UsBlogCareersGuidesResourcesFAQLocationsPressTemplates Book a Call Say hi! Check out our portfolio at AppMakersLA.com/portfolio What services do you offer? We are a Los Angeles app and web development company. As such, we offer: 1) Design for Apps, Webapps and Websites 2) Mobile App Development for iPhone Apps, Android Apps and iPad Apps & Web Development for Webapps. Each project includes full QA Services as well as a product manager. Where are your app developers located? Our app developers are mainly located at 1250 S Los Angeles St, Los Angeles, CA 90015, though we have other offices around the world, and we hire the best developers wherever and whenever we find them. If having engineers & designers in Los Angeles is critical to the project, we have the resources to make that happen. How much do you charge for your services? Our cost varies depending on the project. Please contact us for a mobile app development consulting session and we will get you an estimate + analysis pronto. Can you build software for startups? Yes, we consider ourselves a startup app development company, as well as an agency that builds software for already established firms. optimizing the product launch while ensuring a smooth transition into real-world usage.Not Sure Where To Start?Let’s Figure It Out TogetherBook a Free 30-Minute Consultation with Instant ResponseBook A Free Callwall of loveDon't take our words for itTake TheirsRandy PaynterCEO, StitchedHealth5.0“I highly recommend Growth Loops Tech. I worked with them for over 8 months on a significant web services project that involved multiple dimensions. Gunendu pulled together a team of 4 to 8 depending on the phase of the project (the project included system design, DBs (PostgreSQL, Pinecone), LLMs, API integration, AWS, front end, SSO integration, email management, Reporting, etc.) They were very flexible and produced high quality work.I'm based in the US, and initially had all the standard concerns about outsourcing with a team on the other side of the world. Previously, I've worked mostly with in-house teams, so this was somewhat new ground for me. I'm pleased to say it's all worked out great.In fact, I thought they were so good that I've hired them for a second larger, entirely different, project.”Visit WebsiteRodrigo Garza - OLYAthlete Partnership, IOC5.0“The combination of deep football domain knowledge with modern backend engineering and data science is rare. They made strong architectural calls early — separating the analytics layer from the application layer, building reproducible ingestion pipelines as notebooks and Python modules, isolating goalkeeper analytics to avoid distorting outfield metrics, and baking security in from day one with JWT auth and field-level encryption — that paid off throughout the project. The result is a platform that's accurate, fast, and trusted by professional users.”Visit WebsiteTariq KajjoujCEO, AssetEye5.0“Growth Loops Technology delivered the project on time, successfully deploying the app within the client's organization and reducing end-customer project delivery time by more than 50%. The team was highly responsive, adapted to the client's schedule, and maintained outstanding communication.”Visit WebsiteSergio HickeCEO, Servana Service5.0“Growth Loops team ability to combine modern AI engineering with disciplined product architecture is rare. They made strong design choices early — modular services, a vector-based knowledge store, metadata-driven multi-tenant isolation, and RBAC baked into every module — that made the platform genuinely scalable rather than just a demo. They also handled the complexity of coordinating four distinct user roles into one coherent workflow without losing clarity.”Visit WebsiteMoiz ManaqibCEO, WingmanAI5.0“Growth loops team designed, developed and published a complex AI application around capture, transcribe, and document encounters between consenting partners to improve communication skills with AI analysis and professional collaboration.”Visit WebsiteDeepika BajajCEO, NurosAI5.0“Their ability to architect AI as a core capability rather than an add-on is rare. They made strong design calls early — decoupling the compute-heavy Python AI microservice from the responsive Node.js core, adopting Yjs CRDTs for conflict-free real-time collaboration, abstracting storage behind a unified interface, and using Server-Sent Events for streaming generation — that paid off across the entire product. Their depth across full-stack engineering, AI pipelines, real-time collaboration protocols, and payment infrastructure showed genuine end-to-end expertise.”Visit WebsiteMark JensenCEO, RHS5.0“Growth Loops has been great to work with. I'm based in the USA and had no issues on the project development and delivery. The team produced quality work on schedule.”Visit WebsiteGuillaume BigerCEO, tchatt5.0“Gunendu and his team were a pleasure to work with! They are highly responsive, deeply involved in the project, and always bring great ideas to the table. Their proactive approach and commitment to delivering quality work made a real difference. I highly recommend them and look forward to collaborating again in the future!”Visit WebsiteAgness Mnena (Allagh)CEO, iMongu5.0“Growth Loops Technology Pvt Ltd work exceeded the client's expectations. The team was warm and involved in the project. The team took ownership of the client's product and delivered work on time, having direct communication with the client via email and virtual meetings.”Visit WebsiteJordan RooneyFounder, Built D

Since 2005, our mission has been clear: build long-term partnerships through engineering excellence, transparent communication, and a people-first approach. We help companies navigate persistent challenges - talent scarcity, rising engineering costs, system complexity, and the pressure to move faster without compromising quality. With Vietnam as our core talent base and a globally integrated delivery model, we provide reliable access to specialized engineering capabilities at scale. Orient is not a body shop or a typical outsourcing vendor. We build real technology. We build real technology, and we deliver production-grade AI systems that are designed to scale, remain stable, and perform reliably over time. By combining AI-assisted development with living specifications and human engineering expertise, we help clients reduce knowledge gaps, improve system understanding, and build software that can evolve over time. We believe great software is built by great people. That is why we hire carefully, invest continuously in our teams, and grow long-term capabilities alongside our clients - delivering solutions that last, not just projects that ship. We partner with organizations that value quality, continuity, and long-term impact. Read More Help your peers find the right partner and get rewarded Refer inVerita Explained in 60 Seconds For years, inVerita has been using cutting-edge technologies to build custom software solutions across healthcare, medical, pharmacy, and supply chain industries. Product design, software development, cloud infrastructure, and QA have been our bread and butter for many years. With dozens of satisfied clients around the globe, we help our customers to shape and deliver practical and highly usable digital solutions to conquer new markets and streamline their organizations and processes. COMPANY SERVICES PROVIDED Application development Discover. Develop. Improve! Let us take your product from point A to point B in a well planned and strictly controlled environment. QUARTE design Get a successful product that is not only visually attractive but is customized to users’ needs as well with the help of a human-centered approach and design thinking. Dedicated “smart” team Have your team scaled in a fast and safe manner with top engineering experts that fit your company culture and specific needs. System assessment Nothing is perfect. We know it, and we can fix it. inVerita team will ensure your software has excellent functionality and help you present a robust product to the market. AI DEVELOPMENT Custom AI/ML development Every business is unique, and so should be its AI. We build tailored machine learning models and intelligent systems that solve your specific challenges and keep evolving with your data. ​​AI consulting With 120+ engineers on board and experience in complex, regulated industries, we guide companies on how to choose the right tools, set clear strategies, and successfully integrate AI into workflows. Generative AI We help businesses use GenAI to connect with customers in meaningful ways, from personalized recommendations to seamless support, all backed by our experience in high-compliance sectors. AI agent development We build AI agents that take care of industry-specific tasks, like patient support in healthcare or compliance checks in fintech, so your team can focus on what matters most.
