Businesses 0 Years 0 Projects 0 Professionals 0 NPS Artificial Intelligence and Machine LearningOur software product development company has embraced the transformative power of AI and ML from the very outset of these technologies. Alongside their rapid evolution, we were continually expanding our expertise and gaining experience in aligning this innovation with complex business goals.As evidenced by our industry-leading customers like PitchBook and BlackHawkNetwork, our latest AI/ML development efforts resulted in unlocking new revenue streams, tapping into promising market opportunities, and improving operational efficiency with ML-enabled and IoT-generated data analysis. Learn More Digital PlatformsOur software development company excels in crafting robust digital platforms that empower businesses to streamline operations, enhance customer interactions, and drive growth. With deep expertise in building scalable web and mobile applications, we deliver intuitive interfaces and key features tailored to your business objectives.For PitchBook, we developed a comprehensive data platform that integrated disparate data sources, enabling real-time analytics and market validation. This custom software solution boosted their operational efficiency and provided a competitive edge in the investment research market. Data AnalyticsSPD Technology stands as a top software development company specializing in data analytics services that transform raw data into actionable insights. Our software developers leverage advanced analytics, machine learning, and BI tools to uncover patterns, predict trends, and optimize decision-making across multiple industries.We empowered a B2B intelligence services provider with ML and OpenAI integration for automated data collection and processing, improving financial data processing speed by 3 times at 5x cost effectiveness. Our product development expertise ensures tailored solutions aligned with your business vision. Cloud & DevOpsThe strong combination of cloud and DevOps competencies allows us to architect scalable, agile, and cost-effective solutions, enabling our customers to rapidly adapt to market changes, maintain their competitive edge, innovate swiftly, and achieve higher operational efficiency.By seamlessly transitioning the investment platform from on-premise infrastructure to Google Cloud, we achieved a 10x boost in software performance, while reducing the time required for financial report generation by a factor of 20. Leveraging our DevOps expertise, we streamlined a new feature development cycle for our customer, accelerating time to market by 12-fold. Application ModernizationAs a leading software product development company, we specialize in application modernization to revitalize legacy systems into modern, agile architectures. Our experts assess existing software, migrate to cloud services, and incorporate agile methodologies for seamless upgrades that reduce development costs and enhance security.For Pie Insurance, our modernization efforts led to 3x growth in their payment user base by adding advanced billing features to the existing software and expanding payment processing. This approach delivers custom software development that enables ongoing support and continuous improvement. System Integration & APIsSPD Technology provides expert system integration and APIs development, connecting disparate systems into cohesive software solutions. Our solution architects ensure seamless data flow, enhanced security, and project transparency, helping businesses achieve operational efficiency and align business goals.In a project for an embedded insurance API provider, we created robust APIs and BI dashboards for A/B testing insurance packages, enabling data-informed decisions. Our technical expertise handles technical challenges and project scope with precision. SecurityWithin all the projects we handle, our software development company keeps special focus on security architecture engineering and data protection. With a critical mission to safeguard digital assets from evolving cyber threats, we implement robust and AI-enabled threat detection and prevention mechanisms. Such an intelligent defense system was implemented for Poynt, the world-first omnicommerce platform with more than 140 million monthly transactions. Our efforts enabled the company to improve its fraud detection capabilities, keep its operations running smoothly and ensure compliance with regulatory standards. Quality EngineeringOur software product development services include rigorous quality engineering to guarantee flawless software performance and reliability. We implement quality assurance practices throughout the software development lifecycle, from MVP development to deployment, ensuring products meet the highest standards.Leveraging cross-functional teams and automated testing, we streamlined new feature development for a client, accelerating time-to-market by 12x. This dedication to quality delivers innovative solutions that drive business growth.Trusted Globally by Innovation-Driving Companies From Fintech industry stalwarts to high-growth companies across multiple domains, we ensure the comprehensive alignment between emerging technologies and established business processes. An American financial services firm that provides investment research and investment management services Financial data and software company with offices in London, New York, San Francisco, and Seattle. Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InSPD TechnologyVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewsPortfolioVisit websiteEmpowering Tech SolutionsSPD Technology is a global tech consulting and custom software development company with over 650 experts and delivery centers across Europe. Since 2006, we’ve been a trusted technology partner to startups, SMBs, and enterprise companies—including PitchBook, Morningstar, Space Needle, Blackhawk Network, and Poynt—helping them drive innovation, scalability, and long-term business growth. Today, four of our clients generate over $4 billion in annual revenue each, a success we’re proud to contribute to. Our expertise spans Fintech and digital payments, Data Engineering, AI/ML, and Cloud solutions. We’ve successfully delivered more than 460 custom software projects—from MVPs to complex enterprise platforms—such as an AI-powered capital markets insights system, medical device simulators for DNA sequencing, and a data analytics platform handling 70+ million records. Whether you’re looking to scale your engineering capacity or need a turnkey product development partner, SPD Technology provides the technical excellence, agility, and strategic insight to help you accelerate innovation while optimizing costs and time to market. Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InAjackus4.931 ReviewsVerifiedVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewsPortfolioInterviewVisit websiteShip 10x Faster with AI-Augmented Engineering Teams Ajackus is a Mumbai-headquartered engineering firm founded in 2011 that delivers technology solutions for enterprises and growth-stage companies across FinTech, PropTech, Healthcare, and Travel. With 14 years of engineering depth and 300+ solutions delivered globally, Ajackus builds embedded technology teams that understand clients' industries — not just their codebases. Our engineers have been part of founding technology teams at companies like Dotloop (acquired by Zillow for $110M) and Nium (cross-border remittance across 55+ countries), and we serve enterprise clients including Visa, Wells Fargo, Lockheed Martin, VTS, Gulf Oil, Guidehouse, KPMG, and the UN-backed Medicines Patent Pool. Our industry expertise spans FinTech compliance and payment infrastructure, PropTech platforms and automation, Healthcare data systems and regulatory intelligence across 130+ countries, and enterprise safety and GRC. We also operate a dedicated ServiceNow practice delivering multi-module solutions for Fortune 500 companies and federal agencies, including Discovery/CMDB, GRC, SecOps, and GenAI enablement. What sets Ajackus apart is the depth and longevity of our client relationships. Our average engagement spans 5+ years — clients who get acquired keep us, and founders who start new ventures return. Every engineer is a full-time Ajackus employee, vetted through Tacnique, our proprietary assessment platform that has conducted 14,000+ technical interviews across a 200,000+ engineer network. We maintain compliance readiness for GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI DSS, with enterprise-grade security protocols including multilateral NDAs, encrypted infrastructure, and zero subcontracting. Ajackus operates from India (Mumbai HQ), UAE, and USA. Great Place to Work® Certified. Rated 4.9/5 on Clutch across 29 verified reviews. Manufacturing OUR EXPERTS Meet the team ERP consulting services Home ERP ERP consulting With 10+ years of ERP expertise, Itransition provides ERP consulting to help companies define their ERP strategy and select the most suitable implementation partner. As independent ERP consultants, we ensure your ERP initiative aligns with both your strategic priorities and operational requirements, establishing a solid foundation for sustainable business growth. Table of Contents Service scope Case studies ERP platforms Industry expertise Related services FAQs About Itransition 50+ completed projects of different scales across various industries Hands-on experience in delivering platform-based and custom ERP solutions Certified ERP consultants and developers Strategic partnership with Odoo, Microsoft, and other technology leaders Internal ERP Center of Excellence Our ERP consulting services Discovery We help you lay the groundwork for a successful ERP implementation, ensuring the future solution is fully aligned with your business objectives and seamlessly integrates into your existing technology landscape. Elicit and analyze business needs and goals, user expectations, and major pain points Map out core business processes and workflows to identify inefficiencies and improvement opportunities Assess your existing technology environment, including its constraints Define comprehensive functional and non-functional ERP requirements Outline ERP strategy and implementation roadmap Discovery & vendor selection support We guide you through the vendor selection process, ensuring you choose a partner capable of delivering an ERP solution in line with your operating model, IT landscape, and long-term objectives. Analyze your workflows, current organizational challenges and needs, and strategic business goals Evaluate your technology environment to identify gaps and optimization opportunities Elicit detailed requirements for the future ERP system Prepare comprehensive requests for proposals for potential ERP vendors Evaluate and shortlist ERP vendors based on the defined scoring model Upon request, we assist with vendor agreement assessment and implementation support. Looking for a trustworthy ERP consultant for your digital transformation? Contact us Client spotlight Step-by-stepERP implementation roadmapERP technology consulting for a telecom company Itransition conceptualized an Odoo-based business process management solution and developed a detailed implementation plan to help the client streamline customer service and automate such business processes as billing, provisioning, and customer and vendor data management. Consulting for an international marketing agency Our team provided comprehensive IT consulting, covering everything from business needs analysis to platform selection and solution design to help the customer integrate disparate corporate systems, streamline core workflows, and enhance collaboration and transparency through advanced reporting capabilities. 2xfaster work order managementERP system for a repair and maintenance service company Our team implemented an Odoo-based ERP solution to automate the customer’s core business processes. The delivered software solution helped reduce purchase order approval timelines, automate manual tasks, and accelerate work order management. 80%of manual tasks automatedAn Odoo-based fleet management solution Itransition built an ERP system that allowed the customer to reduce operational expenses twofold and increase client satisfaction due to business operations transparency. 28%reduction in order processing timeDynamics 365-based ERP migration Our team helped a global fashion accessories company analyze and document their business processes and seamlessly migrate to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain Management, achieving a 50% faster order dispatch and a 25% reduction in delivery errors. Our customers say We hadn’t worked with any third-party software vendor before and were impressed with the interaction framework Itransition team developed for the project. Their experts took a proactive approach, helping us build solid communication channels that best fit our needs and enabled efficiency and productivity despite working from different continents. We communicated our operational issues, and Itransition suggested the solution to meet our business needs. We recommend Itransition as a reliable technological partner in collaborations of any complexity. Read original Michael Hakimi Head of Business Development at CyberNet Communications, Inc. We take complete charge of all technical aspects of your project, liberating you to concentrate on your business growth. What You will have: In-house Dedicated Team: Collaborate with a focused team entirely dedicated to your project, and situated in the same office. Efficiency & Transparency: Our Scrum-based methodology, managed by certified Scrum Masters, ensures efficient and transparent processes. Swift Results: Partnering with us guarantees prompt initial results within just one week. Quality: TRIARE boasts well-established software development processes and seasoned specialists, ensuring high-quality deliverables. Full-Cycle Development: From Discovery and prototyping to Design, development, and maintenance, we oversee every stage of development. IP Rights: You retain complete ownership of your project's intellectual property, including source code, design, and documentation. Warranty Period: Your system is safeguarded by a specific warranty period. Core Aspects of Our Mindset: Results-Oriented: We prioritize achieving real goals and key performance indicators (KPIs) for your business. Solution Provider: Our proactive approach entails presenting solutions rather than bombarding you with queries. We handle all technical aspects, enabling you to focus on marketing and business strategies. Going the Extra Mile: As a forward-thinking company, we consistently strive to think and act one step ahead. A range of development services: Discovery and project prototyping. We assist you in exploring and defining your project requirements, conducting thorough research, and creating prototypes to validate your ideas before development. Business Analysis and Product Management. Our experienced team performs detailed analysis to understand your business needs, goals, and target audience. UX / UI Web Design. Our talented designers create user-centric and visually appealing web designs, focusing on delivering an exceptional user experience (UX) and intuitive user interface (UI) for your website. Web Software Development. We specialize in developing robust and scalable web applications tailored to your specific requirements. We craft feature-rich and user-friendly mobile applications for various platforms, including iOS and Android. Our mobile app development services encompass the entire development lifecycle, from concept to deployment. WordPress Development. We offer customized WordPress development services to build stunning and functional websites. Our team leverages the power of WordPress to create dynamic, responsive, and easily manageable websites. Software testing. We ensure the reliability and quality of your software through rigorous testing processes. Our QA engineers employ various techniques, tools, and methodologies to identify and eliminate any issues or bugs, delivering a robust and error-free software solutions. Technologies we use: Mobile App Development: Kotlin, Java, Swift, Objective-C. Cross-Platform Development: Flutter, React Native. Web Frameworks: Node.js, React.js, PHP, Ruby on Rails, CMS WordPress. More than a typical dev shop, we are your tech sidekick, fully embedded in your team with deep ownership and technical excellence, co-creating tailored, high-impact solutions that drive real results. What We Do For over 12 years, we’ve enabled US-based companies to leverage cloud-native technologies to overcome complex data challenges, and future-proof their architecture for growth. Cloud Data Engineering Solutions - that drive scalable growth and cost-efficient data solutions while future-proofing your infrastructure. Real-Time Data Solutions - that deliver instant insights and support fast, adaptive business growth. AI & Machine Learning Solutions- that boost innovation while ensuring security and privacy. Why NaNLABS? Because every hero needs a sidekick who amplifies their vision, we bring: 🔑​ Ownership: Fully embedded in your team, we treat your project as our own. ​ 💡​ Proactive Problem-Solving: We anticipate roadblocks to keep the project on track. 🚀 Impact-Driven Innovation: Beyond deliverables, we drive measurable results. 👨🏻‍💻​​ Advanced Tech Stack: We work with AWS, Databricks, and many others cutting-edge tools to build scalable, high-performance solutions. 🏃​ Reliable Agility: We move at your pace, delivering responsive, dependable support. 🛠️​ Craftsmanship: Thoughtfully crafted solutions that align with your vision and goals. Proven Results CyberCube: Increased code quality by 90% code quality boost, strengthening engineering foundations. HyreCar: Scaled user base 5x user growth, leading to its acquisition by Getaround. Netskope / WootCloud: Achieved 3x faster deployments, accelerating product delivery. Ready to level up? As your tech sidekick, we're here to help you scale smarter with AI, cloud, and data solutions. Let's talk! sections.homepage: HomepageWho We ServeProduct Managers and LeadersDelivery and Project LeadersTech Teams and LeadersBusiness LeadersSolutionsCustom AI AdoptionSoftware DevelopmentCloud Management ConsultingAtlassian ServicesEventsResourcesCase StudiesLibrary BlogBookSpeaking EngagementsAboutGet startedWho We ServeProduct Managers and LeadersDelivery and Project LeadersTech Teams and LeadersBusiness LeadersSolutionsCustom AI AdoptionSoftware DevelopmentCloud Management ConsultingAtlassian ServicesEventsResourcesCase StudiesLibrary BlogBookSpeaking EngagementsAboutGet started AI-Enabled custom software | cloud consulting | software delivery consultingBuild it. Run it. Own it.Some "AI consultancies" teach you better ChatGPT prompts. We build custom software that integrates AI directly into your workflows. Working software. No change orders. Team independence.Schedule a free callLearn about Sketch Trusted by the world's best organizations The results are inOur clients winThis isn't art for the sake of art. Everything we do is about creating better outcomes for our clients: Bank gets 8x faster with AI Public enterprise saves $2 million on AWS cloud Nonprofit improves software delivery speed by 400% See the case studiesWe do things a little differentlyInspired by sketch comedyYes, seriously. Our methods are inspired by the way comedy troupes operate. As crazy as it sounds, we've seen this approach produce results for startups, SMBs, and even the Fortune 500. Learn about us It's time to build better softwareEvery technology leader knows the frustration Way too longSoftware projects drag on without delivering valueWeak collaborationTalented individuals, but no teamworkIncreased problems“Solutions” create more problems than they solve Enter Sketch Outcome-focused product developmentSketch builds custom technology solutions that work for your business AI READYWe bring AI-enabled development to your challenges.Explore custom solutions100% us-based teamNo offshore handoffs, no change orders, just results.Meet the teamAWS PARTNERWe apply deep AWS cloud expertise to your needs.Conquer the cloudAtlassian partnerWe deliver Atlassian implementation mastery right where you need it most.Get more from your tools What our Clients Are Saying“These are the best developers I have worked with in my career in terms of productivity, communication, and adaptability.”Brad HoltzmanDirector, Business Analytics and Data Architecture OUR PROCESSFrom Pitch to Launch in Record TimeNo change orders. No missed deadlines. Just working software every two weeks. Unlike traditional software contracts that lock you into specifications written months ago, we promise something better: We will build something in two weeks. We'll build something every two weeks. And we will never give you a change order. That makes it impossible to build the wrong thing. PitchSketchStageTestLaunchPitchGet creative and bring new ideas to the table.SketchStart teasing out your best ideas for feasibility and practicality.StageBuild a working proof of concept to see what your custom software or AI solution looks like in practice.TestMake sure your technology is ready for primetime.LaunchGet it into your users' hands, then start over and iterate again. Our servicesFour ways to transform your technology Beyond prompts, beyond demos, beyond limits.AI-enabled software developmentGive a smart person an AI tool and they'll go far. Give software developers access to AI APIs and there's no limit to what's possible. Custom applications that automate workflows, cut costs, and drive measurable impact where it matters most.Add AI to your teamTransform teams, not just processes.Organizational consulting and trainingWhen you want to change your outcomes, the first step is changing how your people work together. We help teams master the art of thriving in uncertainty—using principles from sketch comedy to build high-performing, cross-functional teams that turn ambitious visions into exceptional products. From chaos to collaboration. From rigid plans to adaptive excellence.Build better teamsAWS partnership that scales with your ambitionCloud enablementModern businesses need agility and scalability as table stakes. Whether you're migrating to the cloud or optimizing existing infrastructure, we ensure you never have to sacrifice speed for cost efficiency. Built on AWS. Built to last. Migration, optimization, and cost reduction with zero compromise.Conquer the cloudTeam-based tools for team-based workAtlassian toolingProject-based tools aren't helping anymore. Your agile teams need platforms designed for collaboration, transparency, and continuous delivery. We provide Atlassian licenses at lower cost, plus training, custom configurations, and ongoing support. The right tools, properly implemented, with humans who know how to use them.Tool up your team OUR 8 OUTCOMESUnique problems deserve unique solutions.We don't teach you a "system" or preach a dogma. Why would you want someone else's system? You need to find your own way to navigate the AI revolution, deliver working software, and achieve your business goals. That's what makes it your competitive advantage. Instead, we give you the tools to address your specific pain points and create lasting impact. The effects are real, measurable, and valuable. Faster Speed to MarketSee case studyQuality of SolutionSee case studyAdaptabilitySee case studyAlignmentSee case studyPredictabilitySee case studyCustomer SatisfactionSee case studyHappy TeamsSee case studyContinuous InnovationSee case study LIVE TESTIMONIALS FROM OUR STUDIO AUDIENCE“Sketch is positive, adaptive, and outcome based. Empowering teams to build the right solutions with the right delivery approach.”Senior director, ITStanding ovationLIVE TESTIMONIALS FROM OUR STUDIO AUDIENCE“Transformational team of experts that dive in without ego, with patience and the ability to view every new wrinkle as an opportunity not setback.”Product leaderCue applauseLIVE TESTIMONIALS FROM OUR STUDIO AUDIENCE“They actually listen to you and pivot based on your responses instead of forcing your team to work a specific cookie-cutter way.”EMS supervisorAudience laughs with recognitionLIVE TESTIMONIALS FROM OUR STUDIO AUDIENCE“I never felt like we were the customer and they were our vendor. It always felt like we were partners in this together.”VP of cloud enablementHeartfelt awww from audience Behind the scenesWhy we're different Boutique by design, not by accidentWhile our competitors get absorbed by consulting giants faster than project managers schedule "quick sync" meetings, we stay independent. Not because we can't scale, but because we won't compromise. Enterprise solutions. Boutique service. Zero corporate bureaucracy.Human-centered AI developmentWe've been making teams more productive since before AI made it cool. We're still doing it in the AI age, using new tools to enhance human capabilities, not replace them. We always listen for the laugh. The best comedy writers know that the audience tells you everything you need to know. A joke either lands or it doesn't—there's no arguing with silence. We bring that same feedback-obsessed approach to software development. We ship early, listen carefully, and iterate based on what actually works in your environment, not what looks good in our demos.Real user feedback beats theoretical requirements every time.Let's do this The show must go on, and so must your softwareSaturday Night Live has thrived for 50 years because the cast, writers, and crew genuinely love what they do. Even when sketches bomb, even when cue cards fail, even when samurai swords draw real blood, they show up excited for next week.From agile team dynamics to custom AI developmentThat's the energy we bring to your software development. We build exceptional products by elevating organizations from the inside out: fresh perspective, proven methodology, and unstoppable momentum. Our ensemble of expert coaches joins your environment to implement AI, revit

We implement everything end-to-end with a single team accountable for results. Our PORTFOLIO INCLUDES marketplaces, e-commerce, workflow automations, AI assistants, corporate websites, banking apps, data warehouse initiatives, and more. IF YOU ARE BUILDING A NEW PRODUCT OR SCALING A PRODUCT, we can start with an MVP to validate fit in real workflows, deliver measurable ROI early, and minimize the risk of wasted budget, missed deadlines, or business disruption. IF YOU ARE (RE)BUILDING A WEBSITE, we can deliver a fast, SEO-ready site and include GEO (for LLM visibility), analytics/tracking, CMS, CRM and payment integrations, and ongoing support. IF YOU ARE ADOPTING GENERATIVE AI, we help you evaluate feasibility, quality, and cost by measuring baseline time/cost/error rates, checking privacy and confidentiality, and then embedding agents into existing tools with logging and monitoring of time and cost saved. WHAT HAPPENS NEXT: You write to us to clarify the details of your challenge. We help define the scope. We define key architecture choices during the proposal phase. In 2–4 days, you receive a tailored proposal with project estimates. Our delivery is built around a DATA-DRIVEN CYCLE (Decisions ↔ Data) that connects Discovery to Delivery through product analytics and feedback loops. DreamzTech | AI-Augmented Enterprise Solutions & Software Development Home Your Next Digital Partner for Web, Mobile, Analytics and AI Solutions DreamzTech Solutions DreamzTech – Innovation that Accelerates Success --------------------------------------------------------------- For over 15 years, DreamzTech has been at the forefront of next-gen software innovation, transforming ambitious ideas into impactful digital realities. Recognized globally by Deloitte and The Economic Times as one of the fastest-growing tech powerhouses, we empower startups, SMEs, and Fortune 500 giants alike to stay ahead in a fast-evolving digital world. With strategic offices in Tempe and Las Vegas and world-class development hubs across India, the UK, South Africa, and Bahrain, we bring together agility, scale, and global reach — delivering transformative solutions with speed and precision. 🚀 What We Deliver ----------------------------- 1) Bespoke Software Development – Tailored, scalable solutions for complex business challenges 2) AI & IoT Innovations – Smart, connected technologies that drive automation and insight 3) Cloud & SaaS Platforms – Scalable, secure, and future-ready digital infrastructures 4) Web, Mobile & Enterprise Apps – User-centric applications for every device and every industry 5) Blockchain, BI & Smart Tracking – Advanced technologies for transparency, intelligence, and control Partner with DreamzTech to build what's next — smarter, faster, and bolder. DreamzTech delivers AI-augmented enterprise solutions 2-3x faster with outcome-based pricing. Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InDreamzTech Solutions Inc.5.014 ReviewsVerifiedVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewsPortfolioVisit websiteBuilding the Future with AI-Powered Software SolutionsDreamzTech Solutions is a leading global software development company delivering end-to-end digital transformation, AI-powered innovation, and enterprise-grade solutions for over 16 years. Headquartered in the USA, with offices in Las Vegas (NV) and Tempe (AZ), and a strong global presence in the UK, India, and South Africa, DreamzTech empowers organizations to build smarter, scalable, and future-ready digital ecosystems. Honored by Deloitte and The Economic Times as one of the World’s Fastest-Growing Tech Companies, DreamzTech has been recognized for its excellence, innovation, and trust, earning 5-star ratings on Google, Clutch, and GoodFirms, along with Top Business Awards in Las Vegas. With a team of 450+ certified engineers, AI experts, and solution architects, we specialize in: Custom Software Development for startups to enterprises. Web and Mobile Application Development (native, hybrid & cross-platform). AI & Machine Learning Solutions – including Generative AI and Predictive Analytics. Business Intelligence & Data Analytics Solutions for smarter decision-making. Blockchain Application Development ensuring transparency and security. IoT Application Development integrating connected devices with intelligent insights. Our proprietary platforms — DreamzCMMS, DreamzFSM, RFIDTracks, and BestBrain.ai — are transforming industries like manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, gaming, hospitality, finance, and education, including major casinos in Las Vegas. Certified with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 27001:2022, and SOC 2 Type II, DreamzTech guarantees data security, compliance, and world-class delivery standards. Our Core Strengths AI-First Development Approach for accelerated innovation. Award-Winning Delivery Excellence and recognized global credibility. Full-Cycle Development Ownership – from concept to support. Transparent Engagement Models and Time-Zone Aligned Teams. Trusted by Fortune 500 Companies and Global Enterprises in 40+ Countries. With a vision to make businesses smarter, faster, and future-ready, DreamzTech continues to redefine innovation through technology, trust, and transformation. Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InZerone Consulting5.01 ReviewVerifiedVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewInterviewVisit websiteWE BRING IDEAS TO LIFE..Zerone Consulting is a software development and technology solutions company with over 20 years of experience delivering custom software, AI-driven solutions, cloud services, and data engineering projects. Since our founding, we have successfully completed hundreds of projects worldwide, maintaining an almost 100% project success rate. Many of our earliest clients continue to work with us today, reflecting our focus on building long-term relationships and delivering sustained value. A large part of our new business comes through client referrals, a clear indication of the trust and satisfaction our work has created over time. Our in-house team of engineers, architects, and domain specialists is highly stable, with remarkably low attrition of top talent. This enables us to provide continuity, deep expertise, and consistent delivery across projects. Continuous learning is a core part of our culture, supported by dedicated R&D and training teams, which ensures our people stay current with emerging technologies. Combined with a strong sense of ownership and accountability, our teams execute every project with precision and a focus on our clients’ long-term success. Zerone has a proven track record of adopting and mastering new technologies well ahead of the market, helping clients gain early access to innovative solutions that create competitive advantages. Our services include custom application development, AI and machine learning solutions, cloud migration, product engineering, and advanced data analytics. Our mission is to help businesses optimize operations, improve customer experiences, and achieve sustainable growth while building lasting partnerships based on trust and measurable outcomes. Founded in 2012 in Sofia, Bulgaria, Accedia has established itself as a trusted global technology partner, recognized for its exceptional team culture and commitment to excellence. With a global presence spanning 5 continents and over 20 countries, we serve a diverse client base, from South Africa and Japan to the United States and the Nordics. Accedia is particularly strong in key sectors such as Manufacturing & Automotive, Banking & Fintech, Information Technology, and Energy & Utilities. Our portfolio harnesses the power of transformative technology by: Creating user-centric digital experiences for web and mobile platforms Harnessing and analyzing data for valuable business insights Guiding organizations in their cost-effective use of cloud services Accelerating practical gains from AI adoption Elevating cyber security to protect organizational assets Developing tailored Line-of-Business applications Our dedication to quality has earned us global recognition. Accedia was ranked among the top 100 global service providers by IAOP in 2023 and 2024, and we've been repeatedly listed by the Financial Times and Deloitte as one of Europe’s fastest-growing tech firms. As a long-standing certified Microsoft and AWS partner, we further enhance our ability to develop custom solutions that empower businesses in various domains. Accedia integrates Environmental, Social, and Corporate Governance (ESG) principles throughout our operations and value chain. Certified for ISO 14001 Environmental Management since 2015, we’ve been on a carbon neutrality journey ever since. Our focus on sustainable software development, green procurement, and client education positions us as an industry leader in driving environmentally responsible IT initiatives.                         Healthcare
                    

                        Our AI-powered healthcare solutions help providers automate clinical workflows, enable predictive diagnostics, secure patient data management, and improve HIPAA-compliant care coordination using intelligent healthcare automation systems.

 (https://www.solulab.com/ai-in-education/)

 (https://www.solulab.com/ai-agents-for-energy-consumption/)

Unsubscribe anytime.Write a reviewSign InIomico4.912 ReviewsVerifiedVisit websiteWrite a ReviewClaimed ProfileOverviewFocus AreaReviewsPortfolioVisit websiteComprehensive development vertical stack.iomico is a trusted full-cycle Internet of Things (IoT) company with EU and LATAM development centers and offices in the US. Our team of experts in the entire vertical stack of IoT development is skilled around: Electronics engineering: Schematics; PCB design; radio-electronic parts research & selection. Embedded development: C, C++, Python, Embedded Android, Bare-metal, RTOS (Zephyr, FreeRTOS, Chibios), Linux (OpenWRT, uCLinux, Yocto, and stand-alone Linux applications/services/drivers), low-level programming, FPGA programming, and Embedded DevOps. System and client-server software development: Business solutions, web (Node.js, C#, .Net, Python, JavaScript (Vue.js, Angular.js, React.js)), and mobile iOS (Swift, Objective C) and Android (Java, Kotlin) programming, image, and video processing, connectivity to devices, cross-platform QT, and React Native. Edge AI / Computer Vision: Proficient in PyTorch, TensorFlow, MediaPipe, OpenCV, and Deepstream. We specialize in research and development solutions for "smart" edge devices. Industrial Design and Mechanical Engineering: Offering analysis & research, idea generation, visualization, modeling, computer simulations, production of prototypes, and mass production launch. Penetration Testing: Certified in OSCP, CISSP, and CCNA Cyber Ops, we conduct reverse engineering and analyze hardware, firmware, communication, web services, and applications/interfaces. OTA: Mender.io, RAUC, Esper and etc. Our advanced experience includes: Satellite IoT (Swarm, iridium), AI-driven IoT (TinyML)BLE/Bluetooth, GSM (LTE/5G/nb-IoT), UWB, GPS-GNSS, Zigbee, Lora/LoraWAN, RFID, NFC, LAN/Ethernet, Mesh Networks, Thread, MLM2M, Wi-Fi, various MCUs/MPUs. MCU firmware design: STM, Microchip/Atmel, Texas Instruments, Nordic, NXP, ESP, Renesas, Cypress, Infineon, Rockchip, NXP imx9, Nordic NRF5340, NRF9610, Zephyr OS, FPGA, etc. Together we make a change! description.value: KadamTech is an IT services company delivering web development, mobile apps, digital marketing, and AI automation for businesses that want to move faster. JSON-LD:  KadamTech is an IT services company delivering web development, mobile apps, digital marketing, and AI automation for businesses that want to move faster. KadamTech.

sections.homepage: Services Portfolio Insights Careers ROI Engine About Get in touch Services Portfolio Insights Careers ROI Engine About Get in touch Web · Mobile · AI Automation · Cloud Build smarter. Scale faster. Powered by AI. KadamTech is a full-service technology studio helping ambitious teams design, build, and scale web platforms, mobile apps, marketing engines, and AI-powered automation. 120+ happy clients 4.9/5 client rating Start your project → See our work 500+ Projects Shipped 98% CSAT Score Our Trust & Recognition Badges Core Technologies We Master Laravel React Next.js Vue.js Flutter React Native Node.js Python FastAPI OpenAI LangChain AWS GCP Docker Kubernetes PostgreSQL Redis Tailwind CSS TypeScript GraphQL Laravel React Next.js Vue.js Flutter React Native Node.js Python FastAPI OpenAI LangChain AWS GCP Docker Kubernetes PostgreSQL Redis Tailwind CSS TypeScript GraphQL Why KadamTech Your Vision. Our Execution. We're not just a vendor — we're a long-term technology partner obsessed with your outcomes. Ship Fast, Ship Right Our agile squads move in 2-week sprints with CI/CD pipelines — going from idea to production-ready in record time, without cutting corners on quality. 2-week sprints Enterprise-Grade Quality Every line of code passes automated testing, security scans, and peer review. We build for scale, security, and long-term maintainability. 99.9% uptime SLA True Partnership Dedicated project managers, transparent Jira boards, and weekly syncs. You always know exactly where your project stands — no surprises. Dedicated PM on every project What We Build Full-Stack Digital Capabilities From GenAI-powered automation to cloud-native platforms and pixel-perfect mobile apps — one partner for your entire digital stack. GenAI & Automation Build custom LLM-powered assistants, RAG pipelines, AI agents, and workflow automation using OpenAI, LangChain, and Llama — deployed securely in your cloud or VPC. Explore Cloud-Native Engineering Microservices, containerized deployments, serverless functions, and multi-region architectures on AWS, GCP, and Azure. Built to scale from day one. Explore Web Platform Development High-performance SaaS platforms, B2B portals, and eCommerce systems using Laravel, Next.js, and React. From MVP to enterprise-scale. Explore Mobile App Development Cross-platform and native mobile experiences using Flutter and React Native — offline-first, biometric-secured, and App Store ready. Explore UI/UX & Product Design Research-driven design systems, interactive Figma prototypes, and user journey optimization. We design for conversion, retention, and delight. Explore Digital Marketing & SEO Data-driven growth strategies covering SEO, paid media, content marketing, and analytics. We tie every campaign directly to business revenue. Explore View all services → 500+ Projects Shipped 120+ Happy Clients 12+ Years of Excellence 98% Client Satisfaction Industries We Serve Deep Expertise Across Key Verticals We've built for startups and enterprises across the world's most demanding industries — and we know the compliance, UX, and scalability requirements that come with each. FinTech & Banking Secure payment flows, digital banking apps, crypto wallets, and real-time transaction engines built for regulatory compliance. PCI-DSS Open Banking Payments Crypto HealthTech & MedTech Patient portals, telemedicine platforms, EHR integrations, and IoT-connected health monitoring systems. HIPAA EHR Telemedicine IoMT EdTech & Learning Adaptive learning platforms, AI-powered tutors, SCORM-compliant LMS, and interactive assessment tools. LMS Gamification AI Tutors SCORM eCommerce & Retail High-conversion storefronts, headless commerce, marketplace platforms, and unified inventory management. Headless Commerce D2C Marketplace POS SaaS & Enterprise Scalable multi-tenant SaaS products, API-first platforms, and enterprise workflow automation tools. Multi-Tenant APIs B2B SaaS White-Label Logistics & Supply Chain Fleet management, warehouse automation, real-time shipment tracking, and supply chain visibility dashboards. Real-Time Tracking WMS ERP IoT Selected Work Outcomes, Not Just Output Real results for real businesses — here are a few projects where our work moved the needle. View all work → Web E-commerce Enek Luso Discover the Enek Luso Ultimate Eyeglass and Sunglass Store 100% Quality Assurance 2.5x Performance Gain 99.9% Server Uptime View case study Web Marketplace Zenkify Discover the ZENKIFY Energy Healing Website 100% Quality Assurance 2.5x Performance Gain 99.9% Server Uptime View case study Web Health Care PNH Hospital Discover the PriyaDarshani Nursing Home Website 100% Quality Assurance 2.5x Performance Gain 99.9% Server Uptime View case study Performance Engineering Win From 6 Seconds to 180ms A B2B FinTech dashboard was crashing under load — 6.2s average response on a 50M-row reporting table. We inherited the codebase and turned it around in one sprint. How: Materialized views, compound indexing, and Redis read-through cache layered over the existing schema. Result: Latency dropped to 180ms, server CPU reduced by 70%, and zero downtime during migration. Get a Performance Audit → 180ms Real-Time Response AI Model Accuracy RAG Pipeline 97% Classification 94% Extraction 99% AI & Automation Deploy GenAI Without Losing Control The biggest barrier to enterprise AI adoption isn't capability — it's trust, compliance, and IP protection. We solve all three. Custom LLM Agents GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and open-source LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral) wired into your business workflows via intelligent agents. RAG & Knowledge Bases Private document Q&A, semantic search, and knowledge retrieval — accurate, hallucination-guarded, and always up to date. AI Process Automation Replace repetitive ops tasks with AI pipelines: data extraction, report generation, classification, and routing — 24/7. Secure & Compliant Your data stays in your VPC. SOC2, GDPR, and HIPAA-aligned pipelines with zero-training clauses and full audit logs. Get Your Free AI ROI Blueprint → Talk to an AI expert How We Work A Process Built for Predictable Outcomes Every engagement follows our proven 5-phase framework — no scope creep, no surprises, just momentum. Phase 01 Discovery Stakeholder interviews Technical audit Requirements mapping Feasibility scoping Phase 02 Design Wireframes & prototypes Design system User journey maps Stakeholder sign-off Phase 03 Build Agile sprints CI/CD pipelines Code reviews Daily standups Phase 04 Test & QA Automated testing Security scanning Load testing UAT sign-off Phase 05 Launch Zero-downtime deploy Monitoring setup Knowledge transfer Ongoing support Engagement Models Flexible Teams. Fixed Results. Whether you need a full dedicated squad or a few senior engineers to augment your team — we have a model that fits. Most Popular Dedicated Squad A full cross-functional team (PM, designers, engineers, QA) owned exclusively by your project. Full Scrum cadence with bi-weekly demos. Dedicated Scrum Master Full CI/CD ownership Greenfield & rescue projects Weekly stakeholder reporting Deploy a Squad Fast Start Staff Augmentation Plug senior engineers (React, Node, Laravel, Python, Flutter) directly into your existing team and workflows within 48 hours. 48-hour onboarding Jira/Slack integration Weekly time reports Scale up/down anytime Augment My Team Clear Budget Fixed-Scope Project Well-defined requirements? Choose a fixed-price contract with milestone-based delivery and transparent project tracking. Fixed price guarantee Milestone-based payments Defined delivery timeline 90-day post-launch warranty Get a Fixed Quote Client Stories Don’t Take Our Word for It Here's what our clients say after working with us. AI Automation “KadamTech completely transformed how we think about software. Our new AI-powered dashboard reduced manual reporting time by 80%. The team felt like an extension of ours — proactive, transparent, and incredibly talented.” Sarah Mitchell CTO, Nexvora Inc. eCommerce “We

We are committed to helping businesses harness the potential of technology to unlock growth, drive innovation, and create lasting value. With over 25 years of experience, Radixweb has delivered more than 5,500 projects for 3,000+ clients in 25 countries. We serve a wide array of industries, including healthcare, fintech, manufacturing, retail, e-commerce, travel, and hospitality, developing tailored, client-focused solutions that solve complex business challenges. We adopt agile methodologies to ensure flexibility, transparency, and timely delivery across all projects. Radixweb is more than a technology service provider; we are a strategic partner that helps organizations navigate digital transformation journeys. By fostering innovation and enabling data-driven decision-making, we help clients turn operational challenges into opportunities for growth. Our portfolio spans AI-powered custom software, mobile applications, embedded products, and end-to-end digital transformation strategies. By continuously developing our people and processes, we ensure that Radixweb remains a resilient, reliable, and value-driven partner for clients worldwide. Whether a startup or an established company, accelerate your journey with India’s best IT company. Our IT experts solve complex challenges with AI (artificial intelligence), IoT (Internet of Things), custom software development, website development, mobile app development, automation, sensors, electronics, and more. Hire skilled, remote developers from our in-house team. Partner with Ucodice for complete IT, AI, and IoT solutions for all business sizes. Services What We Do Website Developement Ucodice expert in customise websites designs and development ,as per client need through creating visually appealing layouts, and ensuring a user-friendly experience. read more Mobile App Development Ucodice specializes in developing mobile applications for various platforms, such as ios application and Android application . We can assist in creating cross-platform hybrid apps that provide a seamless user experience. read more SEO Services We assist with optimizing websites and web applications to improve their visibility and search engine ranking results. We develop & implement strategies to enhance website content, structure, and performance through SEO service. read more Remote Developer/ Team At Ucodice we provide Remote developer on different technologies, allowing businesses to hire dedicated IT developers remotely.Have a quick access to skilled developers without the need for on-site recruitment & other expesnes. read more Customer Support Services Ucodice is highly skilled in providing customer support service through email support & chat support read more UI/UX Design Ucodice Following Highly compelling website & mobile application UI/UX design for outsanding results. read more Explore All Services Product Research & Development Website & App Development Customer Support SEO/ SMO Startup Solutions Process Optimization & Efficiency IOT Device Development Web & Mobile Interface Electronic & Sensors Internet of Things (IOT) Specialization Predictive Analysis & Decision AI-Powered Automation Chat Bot - NLP Business Automation/ AI Specialization Web Application Development Front-End Development Back-End Development Startup Solutions Mongo Db Express JS Angular JS Node JS Business Automation/ AI Android App iOS App React Native Internet of Things (IOT) 800+ happy clients Worldwide 1000+ projects delivered 10+ Years of experience Who We Are Ucodice is well known for developing complex projects & unique solutions. We are recognized globally as a best IT company that is committed to deliver innovative solutions & delivering high-quality tailored solutions. Since 2013, Ucodice has helped businesses across various industries & sectors in providing custom website development and mobile app development services. With a strong track record of creating solutions that meet the unique needs of each client, Ucodice has established itself as one of the top software development companies in India. When you choose to partner with Ucodice, you can expect quality work and a smooth, collaborative experience. Whether you're looking for a custom website, mobile application development, or ongoing maintenance and support, Ucodice is the trusted destination for complete IT soultion. Our dedicated team ensures that every solution we provide is built to drive long-term success and growth for your business. Adding feather to cap ucodice also offer dedicated team of dedicated developers , remote developers and dedicated support for maintenance. About Us Technologies We Use React Angular Node js mongoDB PHP laravel javascript wordpress MEAN MERN React Native Codeigniter Python Vue.js Flutter Supabase CMS Headless Cms Explore-All-Skills testomonial Real Stories, Real Results Our Success Stories Karen Australia It's been a great process working with ucodice and we really appreciate all the time and effort that everyone has put into this software . View All × Frequently Asked Questions 1. What services does Ucodice offer? We provide a range of IT solutions, including: Custom website & software development Mobile app development (iOS, Android, cross-platform) AI / Machine Learning and chatbot development Internet of Things (IoT) solutions UI / UX design SEO / Digital marketing Dedicated remote development teams & staffing Maintenance, support & customer support services 2. How do you start working together? You can begin by contacting us through the “Contact” page or emailing contact@ucodice.com. We will schedule a call to understand your project, scope, timeline, and deliverables. After that, we share a proposal and once approved, kick off the project. 3. What is your development process / methodology? We use agile & iterative methodologies, ensuring regular reviews, feedback, and updates. This helps us stay aligned with client expectations and adapt to changes during development. 4. Which technologies do you work with? We work across a wide technology stack, including (but not limited to): React, Angular, Node.js, Python, PHP, Laravel, CodeIgniter, Flutter, React Native, Supabase, and more (as listed under our “Our Skills” section). 5. Do you provide a dedicated team / remote developers? Yes — clients can hire dedicated engineers or teams from us to work exclusively on their projects, without needing to hire in-house immediately. 6. What is your pricing / how much does a project cost? Project costs depend on complexity, scope, timeline, and technologies used. After understanding your requirements, we provide a detailed quote. We aim for transparent pricing, with no hidden costs. 7. Do you maintain / support projects after delivery? Yes — we offer post‑delivery maintenance, updates, and support packages to ensure your product remains up to date, secure, and functional. 8. What is your client base / experience? We have served over 800+ clients globally and delivered 1000+ projects. 9. Where are you located / do you work remotely / globally? Our main office is in Noida, India (Sector 127) and sales office in Florida-USA, Tauranga-New Zealand & British Columbia- Canada. We work with clients globally, providing remote teams and communication across time zones. 10. Can you work with startups / small businesses? Absolutely — we specialize in working with businesses of all sizes, from startups to large enterprises. 11. How long will it take to build my project? Timelines depend on project complexity and requirements. After we define scope, we provide a realistic schedule and milestone plan. 12. How do you communicate and provide updates? We use regular status calls (Zoom / Google Meet), project management tools (e.g. JIRA, Trello), and frequent demo reviews for transparency and alignment.
